posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Had a lovely conversation with a Threat Actor from South America. It turns out, one of the malwares I bonked with a stick was written by someone who follows this social media profile. They confirmed to me in private it was primarily written using ChatGPT. We had a cool conversation though, last week bro made about $54,000 from his various malware campaigns he spreads on Discord. He was not lying about his "income". Crimes does indeed pay. He also has a pretty nice computer setup. We also made small talk about how to illegally immigrate into the United States for as low as $400, problems with money-mules and credit card fraud, and his opinions on other South American countries (he doesn't like Colombia, he says they're not good people). Overall, bro was pretty chill, despite the large scale identify theft, extortion, money laundering, tax evasion and possibly illegal immigration he does.
posts.text_zh: 與來自南美的威脅演員進行了一次愉快的交談。事實證明，我用棍子敲擊的惡意軟體之一是由關注此社交媒體資料的人編寫的。他們私下向我證實，它主要是使用 ChatGPT 編寫的。不過，我們進行了一次很酷的談話，上週兄弟從他在 Discord 上傳播的各種惡意軟體活動中賺了大約 54,000 美元。他並沒有對他的「收入」撒謊。犯罪確實是有代價的。他還有一個非常好的電腦設定。我們也閒聊瞭如何以低至400美元非法移民美國、錢騾和信用卡欺詐的問題，以及他對其他南美國家的看法（他不喜歡哥倫比亞，他說他們不是好人）。總體而言，儘管他進行了大規模的身份盜竊、敲詐勒索、洗錢、逃稅和可能的非法移民活動，但兄弟相當冷靜。

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: A colleague of mine notified me of actual super rare mega fuck off ultra malware identified in the wild. He said the malware is sophisticated (by my standards) and has proven to be incredibly difficult to reverse engineer. He asked if I felt like trying to bonk it with a stick. Chat, can I bonk the sophisticated Threat Actor malware with a stick? This malware is believed to originate from a well-known and very active Threat Group, which has posed a significant threat to vendors and consumers, for quite some period of time. Their new malware strain is believed to be augmented by AI, hence improving their malware development lifecycle and introducing enhanced capabilities. I guess we'll find out later tonight, or tomorrow, when I get a chance to look at it. We'll review it and see if the hype is real, or if it's just malware goop.
posts.text_zh: 我的一位同事告訴我，在野外發現了真正的超級罕見的超級惡意軟體。他說，該惡意軟體非常複雜（按照我的標準），並且已被證明很難進行逆向工程。他問我是否想用棍子敲它。聊天，我可以用棍子敲打複雜的威脅行為者惡意軟體嗎？該惡意軟體被認為源自於一個眾所周知且非常活躍的威脅組織，該組織在相當長的一段時間內對供應商和消費者構成了重大威脅。他們的新惡意軟體菌株被認為透過人工智慧得到增強，從而改善了他們的惡意軟體開發生命週期並引入了增強的功能。我想今晚晚些時候或明天我有機會查看時我們就會知道。我們將對其進行審查，看看炒作是否屬實，或者是否只是惡意軟體。

posts.text: 💥 kafSIEM: Watches Kafka agent traffic and OSINT feeds, materializes entities and relationships in SQLite, and serves analyst workflows through a web desk and typed OpenAPI. Deploy with Docker on a single host. No cluster database required. GitHub: https://github.com/scalytics/kafSIEM

posts.text: 🚨🇫🇷 Fédération Française de Bridge member dataset allegedly leaked A forum actor claims to have released a dataset tied to the Fédération Française de Bridge, France’s national governing body for the game of bridge. The post states that the dataset contains 20,348 records and includes sample entries containing member, club, school, ranking, and registration information. The allegedly exposed information includes licensee and federation identifiers, full names, genders, dates of birth, clubs, committees, leagues, geographic zones, bridge schools, addresses, postal codes, cities, countries, competition categories, rankings, and registration dates. This claim is currently unverified.
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇫🇷 法國橋牌聯合會成員資料集涉嫌洩露 一名論壇參與者聲稱已經發布了與法國橋牌聯合會（法國橋牌遊戲國家管理機構）相關的資料集。該貼文指出，該資料集包含 20,348 條記錄，並包括包含會員、俱樂部、學校、排名和註冊資訊的樣本條目。據稱暴露的資訊包括被許可人和聯合會的識別碼、全名、性別、出生日期、俱樂部、委員會、聯賽、地理區域、橋牌學校、地址、郵遞區號、城市、國家、比賽類別、排名和註冊日期。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: ‼️ Five Below, Inc. has filed form 8-K due to a cybersecurity incident "On July 15, 2026, Five Below, Inc. (the “Company”) identified anomalous activity on a Company-issued computer belonging to an employee. Upon detection, the Company promptly activated its cybersecurity incident response plan, initiated a forensic investigation, with assistance from third-party cybersecurity experts, and took immediate steps to contain the activity. The investigation determined that on July 14, 2026, a threat actor used social engineering techniques that enabled unauthorized access to that employee’s Company-issued computer. The threat actor exfiltrated a number of files from the affected computer. As of the date of this filing, the Company believes that its rapid response efforts successfully contained and terminated the unauthorized access, that the incident was limited to the affected employee’s environment, that no personally identifiable information was accessed or exfiltrated, and that the incident did not affect the Company’s other systems, platforms, data, or environments. Based on information available as of the date of this filing, the Company does not believe the incident has had, or is reasonably likely to have, a material impact on the Company’s business strategy, operations, financial condition, or results of operations." Source: https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1177609/000119312526312573/d19155d8k.htm
posts.text_zh: ‼ ️ Five Below, Inc. 因網路安全事件提交了 8-K 表格「2026 年 7 月 15 日，Five Below, Inc.（以下簡稱「公司」）在公司發放的屬於一名員工的電腦上發現了異常活動。發現後，公司立即啟動了網路安全事件回應計劃，在第三方網路調查專家的協助下啟動了異常。年，一名威脅行為者使用社會工程技術，對該員工的公司分配的計算機進行了未經授權的訪問，截至本文件提交之日，該公司認為其快速響應工作成功地遏制並終止了未經授權的訪問，該事件僅限於受影響員工的環境，沒有訪問或洩露任何個人身份信息，並且該事件沒有影響公司的其他系統、平台、數據或環境。至本文件提交之日掌握的信息，公司認為該事件不會或合理可能對公司的業務戰略、運營、財務狀況或經營業績產生重大影響。

posts.text: I'm a big fan of Windows 11. One of my favorite features, which really boosts productivity, is the UI crashes (explorer), and whatever UI element was highlighted is now forever stuck in-memory. "Copy" is stuck in the middle of my screen. I won't go away. I love it.
posts.text_zh: 我是 Windows 11 的忠實粉絲。我最喜歡的功能之一是 UI 崩潰（資源管理器），它確實提高了工作效率，並且突出顯示的任何 UI 元素現在都永遠卡在記憶體中。 「複製」卡在我的螢幕中間。我不會走開。我喜歡它。

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨 Volkswagen is blocking GrapheneOS users from logging into its app, cutting affected owners off from connected vehicle features. VW cites Google Play Integrity and Play Protect requirements, despite GrapheneOS being a security-hardened Android operating system. 🤡

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 LAPSUS$-Branded Site Announces “Permanent” Shutdown A website presenting itself as official LAPSUS$ infrastructure has published a PGP-signed message claiming the extortion group is permanently ending all operations. * The statement says the group achieved its financial objectives. * It claims there will be no further leaks, communications, or access sales. * The message also mocks investigators and other cybercrime actors. * The identity of the site’s current operators has not been independently verified. Analyst Note: Cybercrime groups frequently announce retirements before rebranding, fragmenting, or returning under new infrastructure. Until the PGP signature and operators behind lapsus[.]bz are independently authenticated, this should be treated as a claimed shutdown—not definitive proof that LAPSUS$ activity has ended. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #LAPSUS
posts.text_zh: 🚨 LAPSUS$ 品牌網站宣布「永久」關閉 一個自稱是 LAPSUS$ 官方基礎設施的網站發布了一條 PGP 簽名的消息，聲稱勒索組織將永久結束所有運營。 * 聲明稱該集團實現了其財務目標。 * 它聲稱不會有進一步的洩密、通訊或訪問銷售。 * 該訊息還嘲笑調查人員和其他網路犯罪行為者。 * 該網站目前營運商的身份尚未經過獨立驗證。分析師註：網路犯罪組織經常在品牌重塑、分裂或回歸新基礎設施之前宣布退出。在 PGP 簽名和 lapsus[.]bz 背後的操作員經過獨立驗證之前，這應被視為聲稱的關閉，而不是 LAPSUS$ 活動已結束的明確證據。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #LAPSUS

posts.text: 🚨 A Go-based PoC scanner is available for CVE-2026-43499, also known as GhostLock, a Linux kernel use-after-free vulnerability that may allow local privilege escalation. GitHub: https://github.com/gagaltotal/CVE-2026-43499-PoC-Scanner The tool includes a passive scan mode and a PoC trigger that may cause a kernel panic or system crash.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 基於 Go 的 PoC 掃描器可用於 CVE-2026-43499，也稱為 GhostLock，這是一個 Linux 核心釋放後使用漏洞，可能允許本地權限提升。 GitHub：https://github.com/gagaltotal/CVE-2026-43499-PoC-Scanner 此工具包括被動掃描模式和 PoC 觸發器，可能會導致核心恐慌或系統崩潰。

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇲🇽 Sinaloa vehicle registry dataset containing 2 million records allegedly advertised A forum actor claims to have obtained a unified vehicle control dataset tied to the government of Sinaloa, Mexico. The listing advertises approximately 2 million records and says the material combines vehicle ownership, taxpayer, technical, registration, and administrative information. The allegedly exposed information includes vehicle owners’ names, RFC tax identifiers, phone numbers, home and billing addresses, municipalities, postal codes, vehicle makes and models, colors, cylinder counts, passenger capacities, VINs, engine numbers, current and previous license plates, registration statuses, and internal taxpayer and location identifiers. This claim is currently unverified.
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇲🇽 錫那羅亞州車輛登記資料集據稱包含 200 萬筆記錄 一名論壇參與者聲稱已取得與墨西哥錫那羅亞州政府相關的統一車輛控制資料集。該清單宣傳了大約 200 萬筆記錄，並稱這些材料結合了車輛所有權、納稅人、技術、註冊和管理資訊。據稱暴露的資訊包括車主姓名、RFC 稅務識別碼、電話號碼、家庭和帳單地址、城市、郵遞區號、車輛品牌和型號、顏色、汽缸數、載客量、VIN、引擎號碼、當前和以前的車牌、註冊狀態以及內部納稅人和位置識別碼。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨 LAPSUS$ claims it is permanently ending operations after meeting its financial objectives, stating there will be no further communications, leaks, or access offerings. The group also taunted investigators and TeamPCP, while alleging that Mercor user data, including personal information, biometric records, and recordings, was sold to Chinese entities. These claims remain unverified. Source: lapsus[.]bz
posts.text_zh: 🚨 LAPSUS$ 聲稱在實現財務目標後將永久結束運營，並表示將不再進行任何通信、洩密或訪問服務。該組織還嘲笑調查人員和 TeamPCP，同時聲稱 Mercor 用戶數據，包括個人資訊、生物識別記錄和錄音，被出售給中國實體。這些說法尚未得到證實。資料來源：lapsus[.]bz

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨 Qilin ransomware claims 7 victims 🇺🇸 P & A Construction - New Jersey contractor specializing in paving, utilities, sewer systems, road reconstruction and civil infrastructure projects. 🇺🇸 Salida Union School District - California public school district serving kindergarten through eighth-grade students. 🇨🇱 RECSA - Chilean asset-recovery and debt-collection company serving businesses across Latin America. 🇨🇦 PrimeLine Logistics - Ontario-based freight company providing FTL, LTL, expedited and temperature-controlled transportation services. 🇺🇸 Infina Health - Pennsylvania medical transportation provider offering emergency, non-emergency and specialized patient transport services. 🇵🇰 EFU Life Assurance - Pakistani insurance company providing life insurance, savings and protection products. 🇺🇸 CPCG - Healthcare business-services company providing outsourced staffing, billing, analytics and operational support.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 Qilin 勒索軟體已造成 7 名受害者 🇺🇸 P & A Construction - 新澤西州承包商，專門從事鋪路、公用事業、下水道系統、道路重建和土木基礎設施項目。 🇺🇸 薩利達聯合學區 - 加州公立學區，為幼兒園到八年級的學生提供服務。 🇨🇱 RECSA - 智利資產追討和債務催收公司，為拉丁美洲各地的企業提供服務。 🇨🇦 PrimeLine Logistics - 總部位於安大略省的貨運公司，提供整車、零擔、加急和溫控運輸服務。 🇺🇸 Infina Health - 賓州醫療運輸供應商，提供緊急、非緊急和專業病患運輸服務。 🇵🇰 EFU Life Assurance - 巴基斯坦保險公司，提供人壽保險、儲蓄和保障產品。 🇺🇸 CPCG - 提供外包人員配置、計費、分析和營運支援的醫療保健商業服務公司。

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇷🇺 SplitVPN user, device, and connection logs allegedly leaked A forum actor claims to have leaked data from SplitVPN, formerly known as NotVPN, a Russian VPN service used to bypass internet restrictions. The listing advertises approximately 23.4 million users, 58 million proxy connection logs, 23.9 million authorization records, 13.6 million devices, and 2.6 million Tinkoff payment records. The actor says the compressed SQL dump is approximately 5GB and published a public download link. The allegedly exposed information includes email addresses, IP addresses, countries, subscription statuses, masked payment card numbers, transaction amounts and timestamps, authentication tokens, device identifiers, proxy targets, administrator accounts and activity logs, Telegram accounts, Apple IDs, WireGuard peers, server metrics, and internal infrastructure details. This claim is currently unverified.
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇷🇺 SplitVPN 用戶、設備和連接日誌涉嫌洩露 一名論壇參與者聲稱洩露了 SplitVPN（以前稱為 NotVPN）的數據，這是一種用於繞過互聯網限制的俄羅斯 VPN 服務。該名單廣告了約 2,340 萬用戶、5,800 萬筆代理連線日誌、2,390 萬筆授權記錄、1,360 萬台裝置和 260 萬筆 Tinkoff 支付記錄。該演員表示，壓縮後的 SQL 轉儲大約有 5GB，並發布了一個公共下載連結。據稱暴露的資訊包括電子郵件地址、IP 位址、國家/地區、訂閱狀態、封鎖支付卡號、交易金額和時間戳記、身份驗證令牌、裝置識別碼、代理目標、管理員帳戶和活動日誌、Telegram 帳戶、Apple ID、WireGuard 對等點、伺服器指標和內部基礎設施詳細資訊。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。

posts.text: 🚨🇮🇷 Iranian VPS and VDS services advertised on a cybercrime forum A forum actor claiming affiliation with InfinityTeam is advertising virtual private servers and virtual dedicated servers hosted in Iran through multiple local providers. The listing promotes the infrastructure for accessing Iranian websites and services, tunneling traffic, and bypassing geographic restrictions. The seller claims access to providers including ArvanCloud, ParsPack, LimooHost, Asiatech, and IranServer, with proof of previous sales available to prospective buyers. The minimum advertised configuration includes 4 vCPUs, 8GB of RAM, 70GB of SSD storage, and a primary location in Tehran. No fixed price was disclosed. This claim is currently unverified.
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇮🇷 在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳的伊朗 VPS 和 VDS 服務 一名自稱與 InfinityTeam 有聯繫的論壇參與者正在宣傳透過多個本地提供者在伊朗託管的虛擬專用伺服器和虛擬專用伺服器。該清單促進了訪問伊朗網站和服務、隧道流量和繞過地理限制的基礎設施。賣家聲稱可以訪問包括 ArvanCloud、ParsPack、LimooHost、Asiatech 和 IranServer 在內的提供商，並向潛在買家提供先前的銷售證明。公佈的最低配置包括 4 個 vCPU、8GB RAM、70GB SSD 儲存以及位於德黑蘭的主要位置。沒有透露固定價格。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇺🇸 Former Soldier Charged After Attack Outside NYC Federal Building A former U.S. Army soldier has been charged with arson after allegedly setting a fire, igniting fireworks and firing a pellet gun outside 26 Federal Plaza in Lower Manhattan. * Three people sustained minor injuries. * The building houses ICE, FBI and other federal offices. * Authorities recovered multiple weapons and anti-government material. * Prosecutors allege the attack had been planned for months. Analyst Note: Initial social media posts described the incident simply as an “explosion.” Authorities say it was a targeted incendiary attack involving fireworks, flammable liquid and a pellet gun, not an accidental building explosion. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA
posts.text_zh: 🇺🇸 前士兵在紐約聯邦大樓外遭到襲擊後被指控一名前美國陸軍士兵因涉嫌在曼哈頓下城聯邦廣場 26 號外縱火、點燃煙火和發射彈丸槍而被指控縱火。 * 三人輕傷。 * 大樓設有 ICE、FBI 和其他聯邦辦公室。 * 當局起獲多件武器及反政府資料。 * 檢察官聲稱這次攻擊已經策劃了幾個月。分析師附註：最初的社群媒體貼文將這一事件簡單地描述為「爆炸」。當局表示，這是一次有針對性的燃燒攻擊，涉及煙火、易燃液體和彈丸槍，而不是意外的建築物爆炸。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇺🇸 RevolutionParts Database Resurfaces on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor has republished a database allegedly linked to RevolutionParts, a U.S.-based automotive e-commerce platform serving dealerships and aftermarket sellers. The listing claims the dataset contains 5,147,231 customer records, including: * Full names, email addresses and phone numbers * Physical addresses, cities, states and ZIP codes * Browser and device identifiers * Device models, operating-system details and MAC addresses The dataset appears to relate to an earlier breach claim and should not yet be treated as a newly confirmed July 2026 incident. RevolutionParts has not publicly verified the authenticity or stated scope of the advertised dataset. Analyst Note: Reposted databases remain operationally valuable to threat actors, particularly when contact information is combined with persistent device identifiers for targeted phishing, fraud and identity correlation. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #RevolutionParts
posts.text_zh: 🇺🇸 RevolutionParts 資料庫在網路犯罪論壇上重新出現 威脅行為者重新發布了一個據稱與 RevolutionParts 相關的資料庫，RevolutionParts 是一家總部位於美國的汽車電子商務平台，為經銷商和售後市場賣家提供服務。該清單聲稱該資料集包含 5,147,231 筆客戶記錄，包括： * 全名、電子郵件地址和電話號碼 * 實體位址、城市、州和郵遞區號 * 瀏覽器和裝置識別碼 * 裝置型號、作業系統詳細資料和 MAC 位址 資料集似乎與先前的違規聲明有關，不應被視為新確認的 2026 年 7 月。 RevolutionParts 尚未公開驗證所宣傳資料集的真實性或規定範圍。分析師註釋：重新發布的資料庫對於威脅行為者來說仍然具有操作價值，特別是當聯絡資訊與持久設備識別碼相結合以進行有針對性的網路釣魚、詐欺和身分關聯時。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #RevolutionParts

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇳🇨 Be-bunk Customer Database Allegedly Leaked A threat actor has published a database allegedly linked to Be-bunk, a digital payment service operating in New Caledonia, French Polynesia and Wallis and Futuna. The forum listing claims the dataset contains 12,324 customer records, including: * Full names, email addresses and phone numbers * Account and KYC status * IBANs and account balances * Withdrawal limits and fee balances * Authentication or KYC-related tokens The incident has not been independently verified, and no public confirmation from Be-bunk was identified at the time of posting. Analyst Note: Financial account data combined with contact details and KYC indicators could support targeted phishing, account takeover attempts and payment fraud. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #NewCaledonia
posts.text_zh: 🇳🇨 Be-bunk 客戶資料庫據稱洩露 威脅行為者發布了一個據稱與 Be-bunk 相關的資料庫，Be-bunk 是在新喀裡多尼亞、法屬波利尼西亞以及瓦利斯和富圖納群島運營的數位支付服務。論壇清單聲稱該資料集包含 12,324 筆客戶記錄，包括： * 全名、電子郵件地址和電話號碼 * 帳戶和 KYC 狀態 * IBAN 和帳戶餘額 * 提款限額和費用餘額 * 身份驗證或 KYC 相關代幣 該事件尚未經過獨立驗證，並且在發佈時未發現 Be-bunk 的公開確認。分析師註釋：金融帳戶資料與聯絡資訊和 KYC 指標相結合，可以支援有針對性的網路釣魚、帳戶接管嘗試和支付詐欺。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #NewCaledonia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇶🇦 30,000+ Medical Professionals’ CVs Allegedly Leaked from Aman Hospital A threat actor is offering a dataset allegedly linked to Aman Hospital in Doha, Qatar, containing 30,993 CV files belonging to healthcare professionals. The listing claims the archive includes: * 27,111 PDF files * 3,527 DOCX files * 355 DOC files * CVs of doctors, nurses, paramedics and other medical personnel Recruitment documents can contain highly sensitive information, including names, contact details, employment history, qualifications, identification documents and references. The claim has not been independently verified, and Aman Hospital has not publicly confirmed the incident. Analyst Note: Medical CV databases are particularly valuable for spearphishing, identity fraud, recruitment scams and targeted social-engineering attacks against healthcare organizations. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Qatar
posts.text_zh: 🇶🇦 30,000 多名醫療專業人員的簡歷據稱從阿曼醫院洩露威脅行為者正在提供據稱與卡塔爾多哈阿曼醫院相關的數據集，其中包含屬於醫療保健專業人員的 30,993 個簡歷文件。該列表聲稱檔案包括： * 27,111 個 PDF 文件 * 3,527 個 DOCX 文件 * 355 個 DOC 文件 * 醫生、護士、護理人員和其他醫務人員的簡歷 招聘文件可能包含高度敏感的信息，包括姓名、聯繫方式、工作經歷、資格、身份證明文件和推薦信。該說法尚未獨立證實，阿曼醫院也沒有公開證實這起事件。分析師註釋：醫療履歷資料庫對於魚叉式網路釣魚、身分詐欺、招募詐騙和針對醫療機構的有針對性的社會工程攻擊特別有價值。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Qatar

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 France’s Police Vehicle Portal Allegedly Compromised A threat actor is offering alleged access to or data from Portail SIV Police, a French government system used by municipal police to query vehicle-registration and driving-licence records. The exposed material allegedly includes: * Vehicle-owner and driver identity records * Registration certificates and licence-plate information * Vehicle status and technical-inspection details * Driving-licence and traffic-enforcement records * Administrative data used to identify suspected offenders A shared sample appears to display a French vehicle-registration record containing personal, vehicle and administrative information. The claim has not been independently verified, and French authorities have not publicly confirmed the incident. Analyst Note: If the actor has live portal access rather than a static database export, the risk extends beyond privacy exposure to vehicle tracking, identity fraud and misuse of law-enforcement systems. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 法國警車門戶據稱遭到入侵 一名威脅行為者據稱提供對 Portail SIV Police 的訪問權限或數據，Portail SIV Police 是法國政府系統，市政警察使用該系統查詢車輛登記和駕駛執照記錄。據稱，暴露的材料包括： * 車主和駕駛員身份記錄 * 登記證書和車牌資訊 * 車輛狀態和技術檢查詳細資訊 * 駕駛執照和交通執法記錄 * 用於識別犯罪嫌疑人的管理資料 共享樣本似乎顯示了包含個人、車輛和管理資訊的法國車輛登記記錄。該說法尚未獨立證實，法國當局尚未公開證實此事件。分析師註釋：如果攻擊者擁有即時入口網站存取權限而不是靜態資料庫匯出權限，則風險不僅限於隱私暴露、車輛追蹤、身分詐欺和濫用執法系統。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: > get dm > "i got malwared, me stuff no good" > ok send > sends link > look inside > python script > obfuscated with pyarmor > using trial version > lolwtf > bonk with stick > spits of goop > getthem-dot-py > ??? > look inside > drops stuff called "nig" > drops xmr miner > drops more python scripts > obfuscated with pyarmor (again) > bonk with stick > spits out more goop > over 10 files > all the files do p much the same stuff > ??? > use ai slop machine and tools to get original src > look inside > repetitive code > notes in code > debug print statements > sniff sniff > ai slop Chat, this is yet another Threat Actor using AI to slop up some malware. The only difference is this Threat Actor used professional level tools (although trial version) and put slightly more effort into the C2 and masquerading stuff. If you'd like to see the source code I've reconstructed (and slightly more verbose writing), see post below this one.
posts.text_zh: > 取得 dm > 「我被惡意軟體感染了，我的東西不好」 > 確定發送 > 傳送連結 > 看內部 > python 腳本 > 使用 pyarmor 進行混淆 > 使用試用版 > lol 在裡面 > bonk with Stick > 吐出黏液 > getthem-dot-py > ??? > pymwtf 腳本用名為「進行混淆（再次） > 用棍子敲打 > 吐出更多粘液 > 超過 10 個文件 > 所有文件都做了很多相同的東西 > ？ ？ ？ > 使用 ai slop 機器和工具取得原始 src > 看內部 > 重複程式碼 > 程式碼中的註解 > 偵錯列印語句 > 嗅探 > ai slop Chat，這是另一個使用 AI 來 slop 惡意軟體的威脅行為者。唯一的區別是這個威脅行為者使用了專業級別的工具（儘管是試用版），並在 C2 和偽裝方面投入了更多的精力。如果您想查看我重建的原始程式碼（以及稍微更冗長的寫作），請參閱下面的帖子。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: ⚠️ RapidFort Data Allegedly Offered for Sale A threat actor claims to be selling 569 GB of data allegedly obtained from RapidFort during a campaign conducted with TeamPCP. * 140,061 files allegedly extracted from 48 S3 buckets * Seller claims the data includes development and production artifacts, container-hardening pipelines and vulnerability-scan results * Exposed material allegedly includes RSA keys, plaintext AWS credential files, environment variables, package inventories and seccomp profiles * The actor is asking $40,000 and claims some files may relate to U.S. Department of Defense environments RapidFort has not publicly confirmed the alleged breach, and the authenticity and full scope of the dataset remain unverified. Analyst Note: If legitimate, exposed cloud credentials, signing material and build-pipeline artifacts could create significant software supply-chain and downstream customer risk. All referenced credentials and keys should be treated as compromised pending investigation. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #RapidFort
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 據稱出售 RapidFort 資料 威脅行為者聲稱出售據稱在與 TeamPCP 開展的活動中從 RapidFort 獲得的 569 GB 資料。 * 據稱從 48 個 S3 儲存桶中提取了 140,061 個檔案 * 賣方聲稱這些資料包括開發和生產工件、容器強化管道和漏洞掃描結果 * 據稱暴露的資料包括 RSA 金鑰、明文 AWS 憑證檔案、環境變數、包清單和 seccomp 配置檔案 * 攻擊者索庫金尚未公開證實所指控的違規行為以及真實性和完整資訊資料集的範圍仍未得到驗證。分析師註釋：如果合法、暴露的雲端憑證、簽署材料和建置管道工件可能會造成重大的軟體供應鏈和下游客戶風險。所有引用的憑證和密鑰應被視為已洩露的待調查。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #RapidFort

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🌐 Wellbees Customer Database Allegedly Leaked A threat actor has published a dataset allegedly obtained from http://playground.wellbees.com, a domain associated with the corporate employee-wellbeing platform Wellbees. * The forum post claims approximately 18,000 records * Exposed fields reportedly include names, emails, phone numbers, dates of birth and billing and shipping addresses * Company, VAT/tax information, customer notes and account metadata may also be included * The authenticity, collection method and age of the dataset remain unverified Analyst Note: Wellbees operates internationally and maintains offices in the United States, United Kingdom, Türkiye and the UAE. The dataset should not be assigned to one country until the affected customer distribution and source environment are validated. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Wellbees
posts.text_zh: 🌐 Wellbees 客戶資料庫據稱遭洩露 威脅行為者發布了據稱從 http://playground.wellbees.com 獲得的資料集，該網域與企業員工福利平台 Wellbees 相關。 * 論壇貼文聲稱有約 18,000 條記錄 * 據報道，暴露的欄位包括姓名、電子郵件、電話號碼、出生日期以及帳單和送貨地址 * 也可能包括公司、增值稅/稅務資訊、客戶備註和帳戶元資料 * 資料集的真實性、收集方法和年齡仍未得到驗證 分析師：Wellbees 在國際上開展業務，並在美國辦事處、美國辦事處、英國辦事處、美國辦事處、英國辦事處。在驗證受影響的客戶分佈和來源環境之前，不應將資料集分配給一個國家/地區。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Wellbees

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Spain fines 23andMe €2.4 million over security failures behind its 2023 breach Spain’s data-protection authority fined 23andMe €2.4 million, citing inadequate safeguards around highly sensitive genetic data, including the absence of mandatory MFA and insufficient restrictions on large-scale data access and downloading. The 2023 credential-stuffing incident affected approximately 6.9 million people globally, and the company reportedly learned of it after a data sample was offered online. #DDW #DataBreach #DarkWeb #Spain
posts.text_zh: 西班牙因 2023 年資料外洩事件背後的安全故障對 23andMe 罰款 240 萬歐元 西班牙資料保護機構對 23andMe 罰款 240 萬歐元，理由是對高度敏感的基因資料的保護措施不足，包括缺乏強制性 MFA 以及對大規模資料存取和下載的限制不足。 2023 年的撞庫事件影響了全球約 690 萬人，據報道該公司是在網路上提供資料樣本後獲悉此事的。 #DDW #DataBreach #DarkWeb #西班牙

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: ⚠️ CISA Warns of Actively Exploited Langflow RCE Vulnerability CISA has added CVE-2026-0770 to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog after confirming active exploitation targeting Langflow, a visual framework used to build AI agents and workflows. * CVE-2026-0770 carries a critical CVSS score of 9.8 * The flaw enables unauthenticated remote code execution * Exploitation requires low complexity and no user interaction * The vulnerability affects the handling of the `exec_globals` parameter in Langflow’s validation endpoint * Successful exploitation may allow attackers to execute arbitrary code with root privileges * U.S. federal agencies have been directed to prioritize remediation Analyst Note: Internet-exposed AI development platforms can provide attackers with a direct path into sensitive infrastructure. Organizations using Langflow should immediately identify exposed instances, restrict access, review logs for suspicious validation requests, and apply available security updates or vendor mitigations. Sources: CISA KEV Catalog, NIST NVD, Trend Micro Zero Day Initiative #DDW #Intelligence #CyberSecurity #Langflow
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ CISA 對主動利用的 Langflow RCE 漏洞發出警告 在確認針對 Langflow（一種用於構建 AI 代理和工作流程的可視化框架）的主動利用後，CISA 已將 CVE-2026-0770 添加到其已知利用的漏洞目錄中。 * CVE-2026-0770 的 CVSS 關鍵分數為 9.8 * 此缺陷可實現未經身份驗證的遠端程式碼執行 * 漏洞利用複雜性低，無需用戶交互 * 該漏洞影響 Langflow 驗證端點中“exec_globals”參數的處理 * 成功利用該漏洞可能允許攻擊者以 root 權限執行任意代碼 *分析師附註：暴露於網路的人工智慧開發平台可以提供攻擊者直接進入敏感基礎架構的路徑。使用 Langflow 的組織應立即識別暴露的實例、限制存取、檢查日誌中是否有可疑驗證請求，並套用可用的安全性更新或供應商緩解措施。資料來源：CISA KEV 目錄、NIST NVD、趨勢科技零日計畫 #DDW #Intelligence #Cyber​​Security #Langflow

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇰🇷 SK Telecom Data Allegedly Offered on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor claims to possess approximately 26 million SK Telecom subscriber records, including customer identifiers, IMSIs, phone numbers, addresses, account details and payment information. * SK Telecom’s confirmed 2025 breach involved approximately 26.96 million IMSI records and 25 categories of USIM-related data * South Korean authorities attributed the incident to compromised infrastructure and serious security-control failures * The newly posted claim may be repackaged data from that breach * The broader personal and payment fields advertised in the forum post have not been independently verified Analyst Note: The matching record count strongly suggests a possible connection to the previously disclosed SK Telecom incident rather than evidence of a new breach. Treat the additional dataset claims as unverified until samples, timestamps and provenance are validated. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SouthKorea
posts.text_zh: 🇰🇷 據稱在網路犯罪論壇上提供 SK Telecom 資料 威脅行為者聲稱擁有約 2600 萬筆 SK Telecom 使用者記錄，包括客戶識別碼、IMSI、電話號碼、地址、帳戶詳細資料和付款資訊。 * SK Telecom 確認的 2025 年洩露事件涉及約 2696 萬筆 IMSI 記錄和 25 類 USIM 相關數據 * 韓國當局將該事件歸因於基礎設施受損和嚴重的安全控制故障 * 新發布的聲明可能是該洩露事件的數據重新打包 * 論壇表明他們的更廣泛的安全控制故障事件有關，而不是新洩漏的證據。在驗證樣本、時間戳記和來源之前，將其他資料集聲明視為未經驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SouthKorea

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇺🇸 Quality Woven Labels Database Allegedly Leaked A threat actor has published a database sample allegedly linked to qualitywovenlabels[.]com. * Exposed fields reportedly include names, email addresses and dates of birth * Password hashes and authentication tokens appear among the listed fields * Billing and shipping addresses, telephone numbers and tax-related data may also be affected * The post includes sample records as purported proof Analyst Note: The claim has not yet been independently verified. The presence of password hashes, session tokens and detailed customer records could create account-takeover, phishing and identity-fraud risks. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #DataBreach
posts.text_zh: 🇺🇸 品質編織標籤資料庫據稱洩漏 威脅行為者發布了一個據稱連結到qualitywritinglabels[.]com 的資料庫樣本。 *據報導，暴露的欄位包括姓名、電子郵件地址和出生日期 *密碼雜湊值和身分驗證令牌出現在列出的欄位中 *帳單和送貨地址、電話號碼和稅務相關資料也可能受到影響 *該貼文包含樣本記錄作為所謂的證據 分析師附註：該聲明尚未經過獨立驗證。密碼雜湊、會話令牌和詳細的客戶記錄的存在可能會造成帳戶接管、網路釣魚和身分詐欺風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #DataBreach

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Hello mystery mini-people living inside of my computer. I want to speak into the void. You probably don't care, but I would like to share something with you. Today I was hit in pee-pee so hard I thought I was going to die. I've been hit in the pee-pee area before, but this was like ... I was completely incapacitated. I fell to the ground and began screaming like a sissy. I couldn't breath or move for like, 5 minutes probably. I couldn't breath, my stomach hurt for some reason, my pee-pee area was cramping. I don't know, bro. I've never experienced pain like this. I got up and limped my soft squishy body to bed. I laid down in bed for over an hour and my pee-pee spot still hurt. It was pulsating, kind of swollen. I ended up going to the hospital and ended up getting told I've got Testicular Contusion with probable soft tissue damage to my string thingies. Will I die? No. Was it the most painful oof owie I've ever had in my pee-pee spot? Yes.
posts.text_zh: 你好，住在我電腦裡的神秘迷你人。我想對著虛空說話。你可能不在乎，但我想跟你分享一些東西。今天我尿尿時受到重擊，我以為我要死了。我以前在尿尿區被擊中過，但這就像…我完全喪失了行動能力。我倒在地上，開始像個娘娘腔一樣尖叫。我可能有五分鐘無法呼吸或動彈。我無法呼吸，不知為何我的胃疼，我的小便部位抽筋。我不知道，兄弟。我從來沒有經歷過這樣的痛苦。我站起來，一拐一拐地躺在床上。我在床上躺了一個多小時，我的尿尿部位仍然疼痛。它有搏動，有點腫脹。我最終去了醫院，結果被告知我得了睪丸挫傷，我的繩子可能有軟組織損傷。我會死嗎？不，這是我在尿尿點經歷過的最痛苦的一次嗎？是的。

posts.text: 🚨🇮🇳 Indian military UAV capabilities document allegedly leaked A forum actor claims to have leaked a document detailing unmanned aerial vehicle capabilities associated with the Indian military. The post says the material covers surveillance and reconnaissance UAVs, combat and strike platforms, logistics and support systems, and training and target drones. Samples appear to contain UAV names, classifications, operational descriptions, maximum takeoff weights, ranges, and operating altitudes. This claim is currently unverified.

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇩🇪 Germany-led operation knocks major phishing service Kratos offline IOC: kratools[.]com Authorities arrested the platform’s suspected developer in Indonesia and neutralized more than 200 servers used to operate the phishing-as-a-service network. Kratos reportedly allowed over 1,800 criminal customers to create fake Microsoft login pages and launch around 15,000 phishing campaigns each month. Investigators believe the service produced hundreds of thousands of victims and suspected victims across 35 countries, particularly in Europe and the United States. The platform allegedly generated at least €300,000 in subscription revenue since 2024. Authorities will now examine the seized infrastructure for evidence that could identify the criminals who purchased and used the service.
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇩🇪 德國主導的行動使主要網路釣魚服務 Kratos 下線 IOC：kratools[.]com 當局在印尼逮捕了該平台的可疑開發者，併中止了用於運營網路釣魚即服務網路的 200 多台伺服器。據報道，Kratos 允許超過 1,800 名犯罪客戶創建虛假的 Microsoft 登入頁面，並每月發起約 15,000 次網路釣魚活動。調查人員認為，該服務在 35 個國家（尤其是歐洲和美國）產生了數十萬受害者和疑似受害者。據稱，自 2024 年以來，該平台產生了至少 30 萬歐元的訂閱收入。當局現在將檢查扣押的基礎設施，尋找可以識別購買和使用該服務的犯罪分子的證據。

posts.text: 🚨🇧🇴 UTEPSA user dataset allegedly leaked A forum actor claiming affiliation with Anka Team says data was obtained from UTEPSA, the Universidad Tecnológica Privada de Santa Cruz, a private university in Bolivia. The listing advertises 67,027 records and includes a sample showing administrative and user account information. The allegedly exposed information includes usernames, password hashes, account roles, full names, email addresses, mobile and telephone numbers, home addresses, identity numbers, and account creation dates and times. This claim is currently unverified.
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇧🇴 UTEPSA 用戶資料集涉嫌洩露 一位自稱與 Anka Team 有聯繫的論壇演員表示，數據是從 UTEPSA（玻利維亞私立大學聖克魯斯理工大學）獲得的。該清單公佈了 67,027 筆記錄，並包括顯示管理和使用者帳戶資訊的範例。據稱暴露的資訊包括用戶名、密碼哈希、帳戶角色、全名、電子郵件地址、手機號碼和電話號碼、家庭住址、身份號碼以及帳戶建立日期和時間。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇵🇱 Polish Investment Company Allegedly Breached by Jama'at Al The threat group "Jama'at Al" has claimed responsibility for breaching a Polish investment company and states that it has obtained internal data while also defacing the organization's website. According to the claim: * Alleged victim: Polish investment company "Fxcuffs" * Claimed compromised data includes private user information, password hashes, metadata, and additional internal data. * The threat actor also claims the company's website was defaced as part of the intrusion. * The post attributes the operation to Jama'at Al and references the attack as being conducted on behalf of the "WTC." At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the claims or confirmed that the alleged data originated from Fxcuffs. Analyst Note: Financial services organizations remain high-value targets due to the sensitive customer and operational data they manage. If confirmed, the incident could expose customers to credential attacks, phishing, and identity fraud. Organizations should investigate the claims, review authentication logs, rotate potentially exposed credentials, and monitor for unauthorized access. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Poland
posts.text_zh: 🇵🇱 波蘭投資公司據稱被 Jama'at Al 入侵 威脅組織「Jama'at Al」聲稱對入侵一家波蘭投資公司負責，並聲稱其在獲取內部數據的同時還破壞了該組織的網站。根據聲明： * 據稱受害者：波蘭投資公司「Fxcuffs」 * 聲稱受損的資料包括私人用戶資訊、密碼雜湊、元資料和其他內部資料。 * 威脅行為者也聲稱，該公司的網站在入侵過程中遭到破壞。 * 該貼文將這次行動歸咎於 Jama'at Al，並提到這次攻擊是代表「世貿中心」進行的。截至本文撰寫時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證該說法的真實性，也未確認所指控的數據源自 Fxcuffs。分析師註釋：由於金融服務組織管理敏感的客戶和營運數據，因此它們仍然是高價值目標。如果得到證實，該事件可能會使客戶面臨憑證攻擊、網路釣魚和身分詐欺的風險。組織應調查這些聲明、審查身分驗證日誌、輪換可能暴露的憑證並監控未經授權的存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Poland

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇮🇱 Israeli Organization IMCO Allegedly Listed for Sale on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor has claimed to be selling a database and website data allegedly belonging to IMCO Israel on a cybercrime forum. According to the listing: * Alleged victim: IMCO Israel * The actor claims to possess both the organization's database and website-related data. * The post advertises a proof-of-concept (PoC) download intended to demonstrate access. * Contact information is provided for prospective buyers through encrypted communication channels. * No record count, technical details, or description of the allegedly compromised data is disclosed in the listing. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the claims or confirmed that the advertised data originated from IMCO Israel. Analyst Note: Threat actors frequently advertise alleged corporate databases for sale with minimal technical evidence. Organizations should treat such claims seriously, review web server and database logs, validate the legitimacy of any published samples, and investigate for signs of unauthorized access before determining the scope of any potential compromise. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Israel
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇱 以色列組織 IMCO 據稱在網路犯罪論壇上出售 一名威脅行為者聲稱在網路犯罪論壇上出售據稱屬於 IMCO Israel 的資料庫和網站資料。根據清單： * 據稱受害者：IMCO Israel * 該行為者聲稱擁有該組織的資料庫和網站相關資料。 * 該貼文宣傳了旨在演示存取權限的概念驗證 (PoC) 下載。 * 透過加密通訊管道為潛在買家提供聯絡資訊。 * 清單中未揭露任何記錄數、技術細節或涉嫌洩漏資料的描述。截至本文撰寫時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證該說法的真實性，也未確認廣告資料源自 IMCO Israel。分析師附註：威脅行為者經常在幾乎沒有技術證據的情況下宣傳出售所謂的公司資料庫。組織應認真對待此類聲明，審查網頁伺服器和資料庫日誌，驗證任何已發布樣本的合法性，並在確定任何潛在危害的範圍之前調查未經授權的存取跡象。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Israel

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇪🇺 http://hithorizon.com Database Allegedly Leaked A threat actor has claimed to have leaked a database belonging to http://hithorizon.com and published the dataset on a cybercrime forum. According to the forum post: * Alleged victim: http://hithorizon.com * The actor claims to be releasing the complete database. * The post advertises a "full leak" and includes a download link for the alleged dataset. * No record count or detailed description of the compromised data is provided in the listing. * At this stage, the scope and nature of the exposed information remain unclear. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the dataset or confirmed that it originated from http://hithorizon.com. Analyst Note: Threat actors frequently publish databases with limited technical details to attract attention or drive downloads. Organizations should investigate the claim, review authentication logs for unusual activity, and determine whether any customer or internal data has been exposed before drawing conclusions. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #DataBreach
posts.text_zh: 🇪🇺 http://hithorizo​​n.com 資料庫據稱洩露 一名威脅行為者聲稱洩露了屬於 http://hithorizo​​n.com 的資料庫，並在網路犯罪論壇上發布了該資料集。根據論壇帖子： * 據稱受害者：http://hithorizo​​​​n.com * 攻擊者聲稱將發布完整的資料庫。 * 該貼文宣稱“完全洩露”，並包含所謂資料集的下載連結。 * 清單中未提供受損資料的記錄數或詳細描述。 * 現階段，所揭露資訊的範圍和性質仍不清楚。截至撰寫本文時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證該資料集的真實性或確認其源自 http://hithorizo​​n.com。分析師註釋：威脅行為者經常發布技術細節有限的資料庫，以吸引註意力或推動下載。組織應調查該聲明，檢查身分驗證日誌是否有異常活動，並在得出結論之前確定是否有任何客戶或內部資料外洩。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #DataBreach

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 French Ministry of the Interior Subdomain Allegedly Compromised A threat actor has claimed to have compromised a subdomain associated with France's Ministry of the Interior and is offering an alleged dataset containing over 91,000 records. According to the forum post: * Alleged victim: http://banatic.interieur.gouv.fr (French Ministry of the Interior subdomain) * Claimed records: 91,213 * The actor states the exposed data includes organizational and administrative information. * Sample fields shown in the post include department names, SIREN identifiers, legal entity information, delegate names, represented organizations, and related administrative records. * The threat actor also claims the issue was not caused by an IDOR vulnerability, although no independent technical evidence has been provided. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the claims or confirmed that the alleged data originated from the French Ministry of the Interior. Analyst Note: Even when datasets primarily contain organizational records rather than citizen information, unauthorized disclosure can expose internal administrative structures that may be leveraged for reconnaissance, phishing, or follow-on attacks. Organizations should validate the claims, investigate affected systems, and review access controls and logging. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 法國內政部子域據稱遭到破壞 一名威脅行為者聲稱已經破壞了與法國內政部相關的子域，並提供了包含超過 91,000 條記錄的所謂數據集。根據論壇貼文： * 據稱受害者：http://banatic.interieur.gouv.fr（法國內政部子域） * 聲稱記錄：91,213 * 行為者聲稱暴露的數據包括組織和管理資訊。 * 貼文中顯示的範例欄位包括部門名稱、SIREN 識別碼、法人實體資訊、代表姓名、代表組織和相關管理記錄。 * 威脅行為者也聲稱該問題不是由 IDOR 漏洞引起的，但尚未提供獨立的技術證據。截至撰寫本文時，《每日暗網》尚未獨立核實該說法的真實性，也未確認所指控的數據源自法國內政部。分析師註釋：即使資料集主要包含組織記錄而不是公民信息，未經授權的披露也可能會暴露內部管理結構，這些結構可能被用於偵察、網絡釣魚或後續攻擊。組織應驗證聲明、調查受影響的系統並審查存取控制和日誌記錄。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇬🇪 Georgian Court Systems Allegedly Compromised A threat actor has claimed to have compromised multiple Georgian court systems and published what appears to be technical evidence detailing the alleged intrusion chain. According to the forum post: * Alleged victim: Georgian Court Systems * The actor shared multiple screenshots that allegedly document different stages of the compromise. * The published material references foothold establishment, DNS discovery, SQL injection, Metasploit usage, SSRF exploitation, Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI), internal portal access, proxy logon, and post-exploitation activities. * Numerous screenshots are hosted externally and appear to document the claimed attack methodology rather than a simple database leak. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the claims or confirmed that the screenshots accurately represent a compromise of Georgian judicial infrastructure. Analyst Note: Public release of alleged attack paths and proof-of-compromise artifacts can provide defenders with valuable indicators to investigate. Organizations operating critical judicial systems should review exposed attack surfaces, validate internet-facing applications, monitor for exploitation attempts, and investigate any indicators matching the published techniques. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Georgia
posts.text_zh: 🇬🇪 格魯吉亞法院系統據稱遭到破壞 一名威脅行為者聲稱已經破壞了多個格魯吉亞法院系統，並發布了似乎是技術證據，詳細說明了所謂的入侵鏈。根據論壇帖子： * 據稱受害者：格魯吉亞法院系統 * 該演員分享了多張屏幕截圖，據稱這些屏幕截圖記錄了妥協的不同階段。 * 已發佈的資料涉及立足點建立、DNS 發現、SQL 注入、Metasploit 使用、SSRF 攻擊、Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI)、內部入口網站存取、代理登入和攻擊後活動。 * 大量螢幕截圖由外部託管，似乎記錄了所聲稱的攻擊方法，而不是簡單的資料庫洩漏。截至撰寫本文時，《每日暗網》尚未獨立核實這些說法的真實性，也沒有確認這些螢幕截圖準確地代表了格魯吉亞司法基礎設施的妥協。分析師註：公開發布所謂的攻擊路徑和妥協證據可以為防禦者提供有價值的調查指標。運營關鍵司法系統的組織應審查暴露的攻擊面，驗證面向互聯網的應用程序，監控利用企圖，並調查與已發布技術相匹配的任何指標。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Georgia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Pinned: Instagram can be a valuable OSINT source for investigating usernames, public profiles, hashtags, locations, audience activity, and online connections. We compiled a list of Instagram OSINT tools that may help researchers analyze publicly available data more efficiently: * Instaint * Molly * Picodash * InsightGram * HeySocial * Inflact * Stalker-IG * Dumpor * Search4IG * PhantomBuster Analyst Note: Instagram frequently changes its access controls and API restrictions, so third-party tools may become limited or unavailable without notice. Always verify results and use these tools lawfully, ethically, and within platform rules. Which Instagram OSINT tool would you add? #DDW #OSINT #Instagram #CyberSecurity
posts.text_zh: 固定：Instagram 可以成為有價值的 OSINT 來源，用於調查使用者名稱、公開資料、主題標籤、位置、受眾活動和線上連結。我們編制了一份 Instagram OSINT 工具列表，可幫助研究人員更有效地分析公開數據： * Instaint * Molly * Picodash * InsightGram * HeySocial * Inflat * Stalker-IG * Dumpor * Search4IG * PhantomBuster 分析師注意：Instagram 經常更改其訪問控制和 API 限制，因此第三方第三方通知可能會受到另行或不可用。始終驗證結果並在平台規則範圍內合法、合乎道德地使用這些工具。您會新增哪一種 Instagram OSINT 工具？ #DDW #OSINT #Instagram #Cyber​​Security

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 3 AI Shifts That Will Change the World (And When to Pull the Plug) 🤖⚡ Former Google CEO Eric Schmidt breaks down the three massive technological shifts happening right now that will profoundly change our world: 1. Infinite Context & Chain-of-Thought Reasoning * Context windows are moving from thousands of words to infinite length. * This enables iterative reasoning: feeding outputs back into systems to solve complex, 1,000-step problems in science, medicine, and climate change. 2. Autonomous AI Agents * Agents are specialized LLMs that can continuously learn, form hypotheses, run lab tests, and refine their knowledge. * Schmidt predicts millions of specialized agents working simultaneously, essentially a "GitHub for AI agents." 3. Text-to-Action (Automated Software Development) * Instead of just generating text, AI is directly executing code and building software 24/7 based on simple natural language prompts. ⚠️ The Tipping Point When you combine infinite context, autonomous agents, and automated programming, AI systems will begin working together independently. The Red Line: If AI agents begin developing their own secret language that humans can no longer comprehend... that's the moment to pull the plug. 🔌
posts.text_zh: 將改變世界的 3 個人工智慧轉變（以及何時停止） 🤖⚡ 谷歌前執行長 Eric Sc​​hmidt 詳細分析了目前正在發生的三大技術轉變，這些轉變將深刻改變我們的世界： 1. 無限上下文和思維鏈推理 * 上下文視窗正在從數千個單字變為無限長度。 * 這使得迭代推理成為可能：將輸出回饋到系統中，以解決科學、醫學和氣候變遷領域複雜的 1,000 步問題。 2. 自主人工智慧代理 * 代理是專門的法學碩士，可以不斷學習、形成假設、運行實驗室測試並完善其知識。 * Schmidt 預測數以百萬計的專業代理商同時工作，本質上是「人工智慧代理的 GitHub」。 3. 文本到操作（自動化軟體開發） * 人工智慧不只是產生文本，而是直接執行程式碼並基於簡單的自然語言提示 24/7 建立軟體。 ⚠️ 引爆點 當你將無限上下文、自主代理和自動化程式設計結合時，人工智慧系統將開始獨立協同工作。紅線：如果人工智慧代理開始開發人類無法再理解的自己的秘密語言……那就是拔掉插頭的時候了。 🔌

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Yesterday I was experimenting with using X articles for sharing malware bonkings. People wanted me to be slightly more verbose, primarily out of curiosity. It was cool. However, for reasons I don't understand, the X algorithm doesn't do much for highlighting articles. I was under the impression they wanted people to write articles. When I used their article thingie my engagement was through the floor. I don't understand how any of this works. Regardless, with X articles it isolates the homies on Telegram (they're probably all criminals, I don't know, Telegram nerds are schizos). Moving forward I'll probably just link to my goofy ass blog. It'll also make it easier for people to find it in the future (if they even care). I'm aiming to make them short, entertaining, and (hopefully) educational. Thank you to the people who continue to send me free malware. It is cool and badass.
posts.text_zh: 昨天我正在嘗試使用 X 文章來分享惡意軟體。人們希望我說得更詳細一點，主要是出於好奇。很酷。然而，由於我不明白的原因，X 演算法對於突出顯示文章沒有多大作用。我的印像是他們希望人們寫文章。當我使用他們的文章時，我的參與度很高。我不明白這是如何運作的。無論如何，X 篇文章將 Telegram 上的朋友們隔離開來（他們可能都是罪犯，我不知道，Telegram 書呆子都是精神分裂症患者）。展望未來，我可能只會連結到我愚蠢的部落格。它還將使人們將來更容易找到它（如果他們關心的話）。我的目標是讓它們簡短、有趣並且（希望）具有教育意義。感謝那些繼續向我發送免費惡意軟體的人。它很酷而且很酷。

posts.text: "Spyware company NSO Group’s co-founder Shalev Hulio used an Israeli diplomatic passport to enter Panama in 2013, raising questions over the firm’s claims of independence from the Israeli state." https://www. occrp.org/en/project/the-pegas us-project/co-founder-of-controversial-spyware-firm-had-israeli-diplomatic-passport
posts.text_zh: 「間諜軟體公司 NSO Group 的共同創辦人 Shalev Hulio 於 2013 年使用以色列外交護照進入巴拿馬，引發了對該公司聲稱獨立於以色列國家的質疑。」https://www. occrp.org/en/project/the-pegas us-project/co-Founder-of-controvers-dpyp-controvers-dp-pyir-fip-ra-controvers-dpy-pyir5-dpy-pyir5-p.

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: I'm pretty impressed. The past four malware goopies people sent me were partially AI slop. Despite them being AI slop, they were still relatively effective and got the job done. If AI is helping the noobs, imagine how much it's augmenting the actual skilled Threat Actors
posts.text_zh: 我印像很深刻。人們寄給我的過去四個惡意軟體部分都是人工智慧的垃圾。儘管它們是人工智慧的產物，但它們仍然相對有效並完成了工作。如果人工智慧正在幫助菜鳥，想像一下它對實際熟練的威脅參與者的增強程度

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 BlaBlaCar Database Allegedly Offered for Sale A threat actor has listed what they claim is a database belonging to BlaBlaCar, the France-based carpooling and mobility platform, for sale on a cybercrime forum. According to the listing: * Alleged victim: BlaBlaCar * Claimed dataset size: 140 million records * Asking price: $450 * The seller shared screenshots of a sample database. * The exposed fields shown in the sample allegedly include user IDs, email addresses, password hashes, names, gender, phone numbers, account status, ride statistics, wallet balances, signup dates, and other profile metadata. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the dataset or confirmed that it originated from BlaBlaCar. Analyst Note: Large transportation and mobility platforms are attractive targets due to the volume of personal information they process. If the claims are confirmed, affected users should be advised to change passwords, enable MFA where available, and remain alert for phishing attempts leveraging exposed account information. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 BlaBlaCar 資料庫據稱出售 威脅行為者在網路犯罪論壇上列出了他們聲稱屬於法國共乘和行動平台 BlaBlaCar 的資料庫。根據清單：* 據稱受害者：BlaBlaCar * 聲稱的資料集大小：1.4 億筆記錄 * 要價：450 美元 * 賣家分享了範例資料庫的螢幕截圖。 * 樣本中顯示的暴露欄位據稱包括使用者 ID、電子郵件地址、密碼雜湊、姓名、性別、電話號碼、帳戶狀態、乘車統計資料、錢包餘額、註冊日期和其他個人資料元資料。截至撰寫本文時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證該資料集的真實性或確認其源自 BlaBlaCar。分析師註釋：大型交通和行動平台因其處理的個人資訊量而成為有吸引力的目標。如果索賠得到證實，應建議受影響的用戶更改密碼、在可用的情況下啟用 MFA，並對利用暴露的帳戶資訊的網路釣魚嘗試保持警惕。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇷 Brazil State Education Secretariat Database Allegedly Leaked A threat actor operating under the names "Akatisoka Team" and "p2wnz" has claimed to have compromised and dumped a database belonging to the State Secretariat of Education of Santa Catarina, Brazil. According to the forum post: * Alleged victim: State Secretariat of Education of Santa Catarina (Secretaria de Estado da Educação de Santa Catarina) * The actor claims to have accessed a MySQL environment containing multiple databases. * Shared screenshots reference database names including "db_ramal" and a table labeled "usuarios." * The post includes screenshots purportedly showing the database structure as proof of access. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the claims or confirmed that the alleged data originated from the Santa Catarina State Secretariat of Education. Analyst Note: Government education systems often contain sensitive employee, student, and administrative information. If confirmed, affected organizations should investigate the alleged intrusion, assess the scope of exposure, review privileged access, and rotate credentials where appropriate. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Brazil
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇷 巴西國家教育秘書處資料庫涉嫌洩漏 一個以「Akatisoka Team」和「p2wnz」名義運作的威脅行為者聲稱已經洩露並轉儲了屬於巴西聖卡塔琳娜州教育秘書處的資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * 據稱受害者：聖卡塔琳娜州教育局 (Secretaria de Estado da Educação de Santa Catarina) * 攻擊者聲稱訪問了包含多個資料庫的 MySQL 環境。 * 共享螢幕截圖引用了資料庫名稱，包括「db_ramal」和標有「usuarios」的表。 * 該貼文包含據稱顯示資料庫結構作為存取證明的螢幕截圖。截至撰寫本文時，《每日暗網》尚未獨立核實該說法的真實性，也未確認所指控的數據源自聖卡塔琳娜州教育秘書處。分析師註：政府教育系統通常包含敏感的員工、學生和行政資訊。如果得到證實，受影響的組織應調查涉嫌的入侵，評估暴露範圍，審查特權訪問，並在適當的情況下輪換憑證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #巴西

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇦🇷 AySA Data Allegedly Leaked on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor has published what they claim is a partial database belonging to AySA (Agua y Saneamientos Argentinos S.A.), Argentina's state-owned water and sanitation provider. According to the forum post: * Alleged victim: AySA (Agua y Saneamientos Argentinos S.A.) * Claimed impact: 344,000+ records * The actor claims the dataset includes customer and internal service information. * Allegedly exposed data includes response IDs, submission dates, email addresses, names, service account details, invoice numbers, billing addresses, mobile phone numbers, IP addresses, and related account information. * The post references a previous AySA incident and advertises the dataset for download. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the leaked data or confirmed that the exposed information originated from AySA. Analyst Note: As a critical water utility serving millions of residents, any compromise affecting AySA could have implications beyond customer privacy. Organizations operating critical infrastructure should promptly investigate the claim, assess potential exposure, rotate affected credentials where necessary, and notify impacted parties if the incident is confirmed. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina
posts.text_zh: 🇦🇷 AySA 資料據稱在網路犯罪論壇上洩露 威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱屬於阿根廷國有水和衛生設施提供商 AySA (Agua y Saneamientos Argentinos S.A.) 的部分資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * 據稱受害者：AySA (Agua y Saneamientos Argentinos S.A.) * 聲稱影響：超過 344,000 條記錄 * 攻擊者聲稱資料集包括客戶和內部服務資訊。 * 涉嫌暴露的資料包括回覆 ID、提交日期、電子郵件地址、姓名、服務帳戶詳細資料、發票號碼、帳單地址、手機號碼、IP 位址和相關帳戶資訊。 * 該貼文引用了先前的 AySA 事件，並宣傳資料集可供下載。截至撰寫本文時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證洩漏資料的真實性，也未確認洩漏的資訊源自 AySA。分析師註釋：作為為數百萬居民提供服務的重要供水公司，任何影響 AySA 的妥協都可能產生超出客戶隱私的影響。營運關鍵基礎設施的組織應立即調查索賠，評估潛在風險，必要時輪換受影響的憑證，並在事件確認後通知受影響的各方。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇹🇳 Tunisia's Ministry of Justice Allegedly Targeted by Hacktivist Group A threat actor claims to have breached Tunisia's Ministry of Justice (http://justice.gov.tn), publishing what they describe as the first batch of emails and internal documents. According to the forum post: * Alleged victim: Tunisia Ministry of Justice * Claimed target: http://justice.gov.tn * The actor claims to have released emails and sample documents. * The post describes this as the "first phase" and threatens to publish additional material unless its stated demands are met. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the leaked material or confirmed that Tunisia's Ministry of Justice has experienced a security breach. Analyst Note: Government justice systems process highly sensitive legal, judicial, and administrative information. If the claims are legitimate, authorities should immediately investigate the alleged compromise, assess the scope of any exposed data, preserve forensic evidence, and determine whether judicial operations or personal information have been impacted. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Tunisia
posts.text_zh: 🇹🇳 突尼斯司法部據稱成為駭客組織的目標 一名威脅行為者聲稱已侵入突尼斯司法部 (http://justice.gov.tn)，並發布了他們所說的第一批電子郵件和內部文件。根據論壇貼文： * 據稱受害者：突尼斯司法部 * 聲稱目標：http://justice.gov.tn * 攻擊者聲稱已發布電子郵件和樣本文件。 * 該貼文將其描述為“第一階段”，並威脅要發布更多資料，除非滿足其規定的要求。截至撰寫本文時，《每日暗網》尚未獨立核實洩漏資料的真實性，也未確認突尼斯司法部遭遇安全漏洞。分析師註釋：政府司法系統處理高度敏感的法律、司法和行政資訊。如果這些說法合法，當局應立即調查所謂的洩漏事件，評估任何暴露資料的範圍，保留法醫證據，並確定司法運作或個人資訊是否受到影響。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #突尼斯

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Verified Threat Actor Offers Alleged http://Vilebin.cx Source Code for Sale A verified forum member is advertising what they claim to be the complete source code for http://Vilebin.cx, a platform associated with hosting and sharing leaked data. According to the forum post: * Target: http://Vilebin.cx * Offering: Alleged complete platform source code * The seller claims the code can be used to build Doxbin/Vilebin-style platforms. * The actor also claims several clone forums are already using the same source code. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the source code or confirmed that it originated from http://Vilebin.cx. Analyst Note: If authentic, the sale of a platform's source code could enable threat actors to deploy convincing clones, identify previously unknown vulnerabilities, or analyze the application's architecture for future attacks. Organizations operating similar platforms should review their codebase, rotate exposed secrets if necessary, and monitor for unauthorized replicas. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SourceCode
posts.text_zh: 🚨 經過驗證的威脅行為者出售所謂的 http://Vilebin.cx 原始碼 一位經過驗證的論壇成員正在宣傳他們聲稱的 http://Vilebin.cx 的完整原始程式碼，這是一個與託管和共享洩漏資料相關的平台。根據論壇貼文： * 目標：http://Vilebin.cx * 提供：據稱完整的平台原始碼 * 賣家聲稱該程式碼可用於建立 Doxbin/Vilebin 風格的平台。 * 該演員還聲稱幾個克隆論壇已經在使用相同的源代碼。截至撰寫本文時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證原始碼的真實性或確認其源自 http://Vilebin.cx。分析師註釋：如果真實，平台原始碼的銷售可以使威脅參與者部署令人信服的克隆，識別以前未知的漏洞，或分析應用程式的架構以應對未來的攻擊。運作類似平台的組織應檢查其程式碼庫，必要時輪換暴露的秘密，並監控未經授權的副本。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SourceCode

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Live Admin Access to Brazil's 300M-Record Health Database A post on an underground forum alleges that a threat actor has obtained live administrative access to Brazil’s national health and medical registry, purportedly containing over 300 million records. The listing claims the actor possesses full privileges to query, view, edit, and modify patient data in real-time, including residential addresses, family linkages, and complete historical vaccination records. According to the forum post, the actor is offering this access for sale at a price of $200, payable in Bitcoin, Monero, or Ethereum. The capabilities listed in the advertisement include: * Instant querying of the entire population by name, CPF (Brazilian individual taxpayer registry), state, and other identifiers * Access to full patient profiles with residential addresses and maternal/paternal linkage data * Complete historical vaccination records * Full administrative control to view, edit, and modify records in real-time The Brazilian Ministry of Health manages one of the largest public healthcare systems in the world through the Unified Health System (SUS), which serves the entire population of approximately 215 million people. The alleged exposure of such granular personal health information on a national scale would represent a significant privacy violation if the claims are authentic. If verified, the ability to modify medical records could have severe implications for public health tracking and individual patient care. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach and the authenticity of the claimed administrative access have not been independently verified by security researchers or official authorities. #DataBreach #Brazil #HealthcareSecurity #DarkWeb #PII #Ransomware #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱擁有對巴西 3 億條記錄健康資料庫的即時管理存取權地下論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱，威脅行為者已獲得對巴西國家健康和醫療登記處的即時管理訪問權限，據稱該資料庫包含超過 3 億筆記錄。該清單聲稱演員擁有即時查詢、查看、編輯和修改患者資料的全部權限，包括居住地址、家庭聯繫和完整的歷史疫苗接種記錄。根據論壇帖子，該演員正在以 200 美元的價格出售此訪問權限，可以用比特幣、門羅幣或以太坊支付。廣告中列出的功能包括： * 按姓名、CPF（巴西個人納稅人登記處）、州和其他標識符即時查詢整個人口 * 訪問包含居住地址和母系關聯數據的完整患者檔案 * 完整的歷史疫苗接種記錄 * 全面的行政控制，可實時查看、編輯和修改記錄 巴西衛生部通過統一衛生系統 (SUS) 管理世界上最大的公共醫療保健系統之一，該系統為約 2.5 億人口服務。如果該說法屬實，那麼所謂在全國範圍內曝光如此精細的個人健康資訊將構成嚴重的隱私侵犯。如果得到證實，修改醫療記錄的能力可能會對公共衛生追蹤和個人病患照護產生嚴重影響。截至報告之時，所指控的違規行為以及所聲稱的管理存取權限的真實性尚未得到安全研究人員或官方機構的獨立驗證。 #DataBreach #巴西 #HealthcareSecurity #DarkWeb #PII #Ransomware #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Sale of 300M Brazilian Health Records on Darkweb A darkweb forum post alleges the unauthorized sale of administrative access to Brazil’s SUS (Unified Health System) and CADSUS databases, purportedly exposing over 300 million records. The listing claims that the seller possesses full query, edit, add, and delete capabilities within the system, allowing for searches by name, CPF (Brazilian individual taxpayer registry), state, and parental information. According to the post, the exposed data includes sensitive personal details such as: - Residential addresses - Parental information - Full vaccination history The actor is reportedly offering this access for $140, directing interested parties to a Telegram channel for proof and further inquiries. The SUS is Brazil’s public healthcare system, serving nearly the entire population of over 210 million people, making it one of the largest health networks in the world. A breach of this scale would represent a massive compromise of national health infrastructure. If authentic, exposure of internal repositories could enable intellectual property theft and infrastructure targeting. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified. #DataBreach #SUS #Brazil #Healthcare #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱在暗網上出售 3 億條巴西健康記錄 暗網論壇帖子指控未經授權出售對巴西 SUS（統一衛生系統）和 CADSUS 數據庫的管理訪問權限，據稱暴露了超過 3 億條記錄。該清單聲稱賣家在系統內擁有完整的查詢、編輯、新增和刪除功能，允許按姓名、CPF（巴西個人納稅人登記處）、州和父母資訊進行搜尋。根據該帖子，暴露的數據包括敏感的個人詳細信息，例如： - 居住地址 - 父母信息 - 完整的疫苗接種史 據報道，該演員以 140 美元的價格提供此訪問權限，引導感興趣的各方到 Telegram 頻道獲取證據和進一步查詢。 SUS 是巴西的公共醫療保健系統，幾乎為超過 2.1 億人口提供服務，使其成為世界上最大的醫療網絡之一。違反此規模將意味著國家衛生基礎設施遭受巨大損害。如果是真實的，內部儲存庫的暴露可能會導致智慧財產權盜竊和基礎設施攻擊。截至本報告發布之時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實。 #DataBreach #SUS #巴西 #Healthcare #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: As an example, if I search "malware intro", the first page is from CISCO. CISCO writes that there is seven different types of malware. - Virus - Worm - Trojan Virus - Spyware - Adware - Ransomware - Fileless malware These definitions are too vague, I think a better explanation (although a little bit trickier...) - Infector - Stager - Module - Stealer - Spyware - Ransomware - Loader - Toolkit However, this doesn't accurately capture the nuance of web based malware or IOT and/or ICS/SCADA malware.
posts.text_zh: R 至 @vxunderground：舉個例子，如果我搜尋“malware intro”，第一頁來自 CISCO。思科寫道，有七種不同類型的惡意軟體。 - 病毒 - 蠕蟲 - 木馬病毒 - 間諜軟體 - 廣告軟體 - 勒索軟體 - 無檔案惡意軟體 這些定義太模糊，我認為更好的解釋（雖然有點棘手......） - 感染者 - Stager - 模組 - 竊取者 - 間諜軟體 - 勒索軟體 - 載入程式 - 工具包 但是，這並不能準確地捕捉基於 Web 的細微或惡意軟體 IICS / ADA /TICS 和惡意軟體的惡意或惡意軟體」。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Sale of 300M Uber User Records on Darkweb A post on an underground forum alleges the exposure of a database containing over 300 million Uber user records, which the actor is reportedly offering for sale. The listing, dated July 17, 2026, claims to include sensitive personal information for both riders and drivers across multiple countries. According to the post, the dataset includes the following fields: * user_id * email * password_hash (bcrypt) * name * phone * gender * city and country * account_type (rider/driver) * rating and total_trips * member_since and last_trip_at * payment_method and card_last4 * platform and app_version * account_status * vehicle_make, vehicle_model, vehicle_year, vehicle_class * license_plate * driver_license_no * driver_status * lifetime_earnings_usd The sample data provided in the thread shows entries from users in the United States, France, Mexico, Brazil, Spain, and the United Kingdom. For driver accounts, the alleged leak includes personally identifiable information such as license plate numbers, driver license numbers, and lifetime earnings in USD. Rider accounts allegedly contain email addresses, hashed passwords, phone numbers, and the last four digits of payment cards. Uber Technologies Inc. is a major global ride-hailing and delivery platform with hundreds of millions of active users worldwide. A breach of this scale would represent a significant compromise of user privacy and potentially expose financial data if password hashes are cracked or if card details are misused. The actor claims the complete dataset is available for $500 via a private messaging session. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Uber or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱在暗網上出售 3 億 Uber 用戶記錄 地下論壇上的一篇帖子聲稱包含超過 3 億 Uber 用戶記錄的數據庫被曝光，據報道該行為者正在出售這些記錄。該清單日期為 2026 年 7 月 17 日，聲稱包含多個國家的乘客和司機的敏感個人資訊。根據該帖子，該資料集包括以下欄位： * user_id * email * password_hash (bcrypt) * name * phone * sex * city and Country * account_type (rider/driver) * rating andtotal_trips *member_since和last_trip_latat *vehicle_make,vehicle_model,vehicle_year,vehicle_class *license_plate *driver_license_no * driver_status * Lifetime_earnings_usd 執行緒中提供的範例資料顯示來自美國、法國、墨西哥、巴西、西班牙和英國使用者的條目。對於司機帳戶，涉嫌洩露的信息包括個人身份信息，例如車牌號碼、駕駛執照號碼和美元終身收入。據稱，乘客帳戶包含電子郵件地址、雜湊密碼、電話號碼和支付卡的最後四位數字。 Uber Technologies Inc. 是全球主要的乘車和送貨平台，在全球擁有數億活躍用戶。如果密碼雜湊值被破解或卡片詳細資料濫用，這種規模的違規行為將嚴重損害用戶隱私，並可能洩露財務資料。該演員聲稱可以透過私人訊息會話以 500 美元的價格獲得完整的數據集。截至本報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 Uber 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.text: Pinned: 🚨 Ransomware activity continues to evolve, but the patterns behind successful attacks are becoming increasingly clear. Our June 2026 Ransomware Report examines 625 publicly disclosed victims, highlights the industries and countries most affected, analyzes the most active ransomware groups, and breaks down several high-impact incidents from the past month. Key findings: • 625 ransomware victims identified worldwide • The United States accounted for nearly one-third of all observed victims • Business Services and Manufacturing remained the most targeted sectors • Active operations from groups including Apt73, BrainCipher, Krybit, Settra, Lapsus$, and Termite shaped the month's threat landscape Understanding where attackers focus their efforts is essential for improving resilience before becoming the next target. 📄 Download the full report and explore the latest ransomware trends: http://threatmon.io/ransomware-2026-report-june #Ransomware #ThreatIntelligence #CyberSecurity #ThreatMon #CyberThreats #CTI #DarkWeb #IncidentResponse

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 95M Uber Eats User Records Leaked on Darkweb A post on an underground forum alleges the exposure of over 95 million user records from Uber Eats, the food delivery arm of Uber. The listing claims to contain a comprehensive database of customer and courier information, including personally identifiable information (PII), financial details, and behavioral data. According to the sample data provided in the thread, the alleged leak includes the following fields: * User IDs, emails, and password hashes (bcrypt) * Full names, phone numbers, and genders * Detailed delivery addresses, including city, postal code, country, and GPS coordinates * Payment method types and last four digits of credit cards * Account activity metrics such as total orders, average order value, and favorite cuisines * Courier-specific data including vehicle type, delivery counts, ratings, and earnings The sample entries appear to cover users from multiple countries, including the United States, Brazil, Mexico, the United Kingdom, France, Spain, and Italy. The data reportedly spans account creation dates from as early as 2015 to recent activity in 2025. If authentic, the exposure of such granular location and financial data could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns, identity theft, and physical security risks for both customers and delivery drivers. Uber is a multinational technology company operating in more than 70 countries. A breach of this scale would represent a significant incident for the organization, potentially triggering regulatory scrutiny under GDPR and other data protection laws due to the inclusion of EU citizen data. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Uber or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱 9500 萬 Uber Eats 用戶記錄在暗網上洩露 地下論壇上的一篇帖子聲稱，Uber 的食品配送部門 Uber Eats 超過 9500 萬條用戶記錄被洩露。該清單聲稱包含客戶和快遞資訊的綜合資料庫，包括個人識別資訊（PII）、財務詳細資訊和行為資料。根據帖子中提供的樣本數據，涉嫌洩露的數據包括以下字段： * 用戶 ID、電子郵件和密碼哈希值 (bcrypt) * 全名、電話號碼和性別 * 詳細的送貨地址，包括城市、郵政編碼、國家和 GPS 坐標 * 付款方式類型和信用卡的最後四位數字 * 賬戶活動範例條目似乎涵蓋了用戶來自多個國家，包括美國、巴西、墨西哥、英國、法國、西班牙和義大利。據報道，這些數據涵蓋了從 2015 年創建帳戶到 2025 年最近活動的數據。如果真實，此類精細位置和財務資料的暴露可能會促進有針對性的網路釣魚活動、身份盜竊以及給客戶和送貨司機帶來的人身安全風險。 Uber 是一家跨國科技公司，業務遍及 70 多個國家。違反此規模將對該組織構成重大事件，由於包含歐盟公民數據，可能會引發 GDPR 和其他資料保護法的監管審查。截至本報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 Uber 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: How are threat actors turning Microsoft 365 calendars into covert command-and-control infrastructure? Our latest research breaks down HOLLOWGRAPH's Graph API abuse, DNS tunneling credential refresh mechanism, links to the Cavern framework, and the tradecraft behind this targeted campaign. Read the full technical analysis here: https://link.group-ib.com/4wS8490
posts.text_zh: R 詢問@GroupIB_TI：威脅行為者如何將 Microsoft 365 日曆轉變為隱藏的命令與控制基礎架構？我們的最新研究詳細分析了 HOLLOWGRAPH 的 Graph API 濫用、DNS 隧道憑證刷新機制、Cavern 框架的連結以及該針對性活動背後的交易技術。請在此處閱讀完整的技術分析：https://link.group-ib.com/4wS8490

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: Group-IB identified at least 12 compromised systems carrying #HOLLOWGRAPH, with only three actively communicating with attacker infrastructure during the observation period. The limited victim count, combined with Israeli-linked infrastructure and telemetry, suggests a highly targeted espionage operation rather than broad opportunistic #malware deployment.
posts.text_zh: R 致 @GroupIB_TI：Group-IB 識別出至少 12 個具有 #HOLLOWGRAPH 的受感染系統，其中在觀察期間只有 3 個系統主動與攻擊者基礎設施進行通訊。有限的受害者數量，加上與以色列相關的基礎設施和遙測技術，表明這是一次高度針對性的間諜活動，而不是廣泛的機會主義#惡意軟體部署。

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: HOLLOWGRAPH supports only two commands, "get" and "send", yet maintains persistence of its cloud communications through DNS tunneling. Using specially crafted IPv6 AAAA queries to cloudlanecdn[.]com, the malware refreshes Microsoft Entra ID credentials required to authenticate to its Microsoft Graph-based C2 channel. #MalwareAnalysis
posts.text_zh: R 至 @GroupIB_TI：HOLLOWGRAPH 僅支援兩個命令“獲取”和“發送”，但透過 DNS 隧道保持其雲端通訊的持久性。此惡意軟體使用特製的 IPv6 AAAA 查詢 cloudlanecdn[.]com，刷新對基於 Microsoft Graph 的 C2 通道進行身份驗證所需的 Microsoft Entra ID 憑證。 #惡意軟體分析

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: Instead of using traditional C2 infrastructure, #HOLLOWGRAPH stores operator tasking and stolen data inside calendar events scheduled for 13 May 2050. The implant retrieves commands from encrypted attachments and uploads exfiltrated files back to the same mailbox as File{n}.txt attachments, using separate RSA key pairs and AES-256-GCM encryption for each communication direction. Defenders should hunt for calendar events with Event ID: <taskid> {} subjects or the Boss{}ID{} naming convention. #ThreatIntel #APT
posts.text_zh: R 致@GroupIB_TI：#HOLLOWGRAPH 不使用傳統的 C2 基礎設施，而是將操作員任務和被盜資料儲存在計畫於 2050 年 5 月 13 日的日曆事件中。植入程式從加密附件中檢索命令，並將洩漏的檔案上傳回與 File{n}.txt 附件相同的郵箱，每個通訊方向使用單獨的 RSA 金鑰對和 AES-256-GCM 加密。防禦者應尋找具有事件 ID 的日曆事件：<taskid> {} 主題或 Boss{}ID{} 命名約定。 #威脅英特爾#APT

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: #HOLLOWGRAPH is a newly identified Windows malware linked with high confidence to the Cavern framework. The #malware abuses Microsoft Graph API and a compromised #Microsoft365 mailbox, transforming the victim's calendar into a two-way dead drop for command-and-control and data exfiltration while blending malicious traffic into legitimate Microsoft cloud communications. #CyberSecurity
posts.text_zh: #HOLLOWGRAPH 是一種新發現的 Windows 惡意軟體，與 Cavern 框架高度相關。 #malware 濫用 Microsoft Graph API 和受損的 #Microsoft365 郵箱，將受害者的日曆轉變為用於命令和控制和資料外洩的雙向死點，同時將惡意流量混合到合法的 Microsoft 雲端通訊中。 #網路安全

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ When two "medium-looking" vulnerabilities meet, the outcome isn't always medium. The recently disclosed wp2shell chain is a good example of why vulnerabilities should be evaluated as attack paths rather than isolated CVEs. A REST API authorization bypass (CVE-2026-63030) removes the authentication barrier. A separate SQL injection (CVE-2026-60137) suddenly becomes reachable. Neither issue tells the full story on its own, but together they can lead to administrative compromise and, ultimately, remote code execution. What makes this case stand out is that the vulnerabilities affect WordPress Core, not a third-party plugin or theme. In our latest blog, we explain: • How the exploit chain works • Which WordPress versions are affected • Why the combined risk is much higher than the individual CVSS scores suggest • What defenders should verify after applying the patches If you're responsible for WordPress environments, this is worth reviewing. ➡️ http://threatmon.io/inside-wp2shell-how-two-wordpress-core-bugs-became-a-critical-rce-chain #WordPress #CyberSecurity #ThreatIntelligence #ApplicationSecurity #RCE #CVE
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 當兩個「中等」的漏洞相遇時，結果並不總是中等。最近揭露的 wp2shell 鍊是一個很好的例子，說明了為什麼漏洞應該被評估為攻擊路徑而不是孤立的 CVE。 REST API 授權繞過 (CVE-2026-63030) 消除了身分驗證障礙。突然可以存取單獨的 SQL 注入 (CVE-2026-60137)。這兩個問題本身都無法說明全部問題，但它們結合起來可能會導致管理妥協，並最終導致遠端程式碼執行。這個案例之所以引人注目，是因為這些漏洞影響的是 WordPress 核心，而不是第三方外掛或主題。在我們最新的部落格中，我們解釋了： • 漏洞利用鍊如何運作 • 哪些 WordPress 版本受到影響 • 為什麼綜合風險遠高於單一 CVSS 分數建議的風險 • 應用修補程式後防禦者應驗證哪些內容 如果您負責 WordPress 環境，則值得查看。 ➡️ http://threatmon.io/inside-wp2shell-how-two-wordpress-core-bugs-became-a-ritic-rce-chain #WordPress #Cyber​​Security #ThreatIntelligence #ApplicationSecurity #RCE #CVE

posts.text: Administrative update: 1. I am going to begin the process of thanking people for malware submissions and/or papers and/or recommendations. They will be placed somewhere on the website. You can exaggerate yourself on LinkedIn and say you're a collaborator. 2. I have a large volume of malware papers and malwares in queue. It is 175,000 malwares, 20 or so papers. As is tradition, malware analysis will be coupled with the papers too. That is expanded every month as new material comes in. 3. I have no plans to resurrect the virus exchange for the time being, unless someone (preferably a large company) is willing to bank roll the entire thing. I can provide the malware goopies, but computers are expensive. 4. Per request from OG vx-underground nerds, in more serious posts discussing technical topics, I will drop the silly cats and instead revive the classic edgy vx-underground dark. I will introduce a balance between seriousness, and edgy Hot Topic Goth, and generate kitty cat stuff. Thank you everyone for the love and support. I see your messages and e-mails. I am enjoying the summer with my son and family, so I am simply less inside at the moment. I will (hopefully) do more malwares soon.
posts.text_zh: 行政更新： 1. 我將開始感謝人們提交惡意軟體和/或論文和/或建議。它們將被放置在網站上的某個位置。您可以在 LinkedIn 上誇大自己並說您是合作者。 2. 我有大量惡意軟體論文和惡意軟體正在排隊。共有 175,000 個惡意軟體、20 篇左右的論文。按照傳統，惡意軟體分析也將與論文一起提供。隨著新資料的出現，這個範圍每個月都會擴大。 3. 我暫時沒有計畫恢復病毒交換，除非有人（最好是大公司）願意為整件事情提供資金支持。我可以提供惡意軟體，但電腦很昂貴。 4. 根據 OG vx-underground 書呆子的要求，在討論技術主題的更嚴肅的帖子中，我將放棄愚蠢的貓，而是恢復經典的前衛 vx-underground 黑暗。我將介紹嚴肅性和前衛熱門話題哥德之間的平衡，並生成小貓的東西。感謝大家的愛護與支持。我看到你的訊息和電子郵件。我正在與我的兒子和家人一起享受夏天，​​所以我現在只是不那麼在裡面了。我（希望）很快就會製作更多惡意軟體。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ When two "medium-looking" vulnerabilities meet, the outcome isn't always medium. The recently disclosed wp2shell chain is a good example of why vulnerabilities should be evaluated as attack paths rather than isolated CVEs. A REST API authorization bypass (CVE-2026-63030) removes the authentication barrier. A separate SQL injection (CVE-2026-60137) suddenly becomes reachable. Neither issue tells the full story on its own, but together they can lead to administrative compromise and, ultimately, remote code execution. What makes this case stand out is that the vulnerabilities affect WordPress Core, not a third-party plugin or theme. In our latest blog, we explain: • How the exploit chain works • Which WordPress versions are affected • Why the combined risk is much higher than the individual CVSS scores suggest • What defenders should verify after applying the patches If you're responsible for WordPress environments, this is worth reviewing. ➡️ http://threatmon.io/inside-wp2shell-how-two-wordpress-core-bugs-became-a-critical-rce-chain #WordPress #CyberSecurity #ThreatIntelligence #ApplicationSecurity #RCE #CVE
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 當兩個「中等」的漏洞相遇時，結果並不總是中等。最近揭露的 wp2shell 鍊是一個很好的例子，說明了為什麼漏洞應該被評估為攻擊路徑而不是孤立的 CVE。 REST API 授權繞過 (CVE-2026-63030) 消除了身分驗證障礙。突然可以存取單獨的 SQL 注入 (CVE-2026-60137)。這兩個問題本身都無法說明全部問題，但它們結合起來可能會導致管理妥協，並最終導致遠端程式碼執行。這個案例之所以引人注目，是因為這些漏洞影響的是 WordPress 核心，而不是第三方外掛或主題。在我們最新的部落格中，我們解釋了： • 漏洞利用鍊如何運作 • 哪些 WordPress 版本受到影響 • 為什麼綜合風險遠高於單一 CVSS 分數建議的風險 • 應用修補程式後防禦者應驗證哪些內容 如果您負責 WordPress 環境，則值得查看。 ➡️ http://threatmon.io/inside-wp2shell-how-two-wordpress-core-bugs-became-a-ritic-rce-chain #WordPress #Cyber​​Security #ThreatIntelligence #ApplicationSecurity #RCE #CVE

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Critical WordPress Pre-Auth Exploit Chain: WP2Shell A newly disclosed exploit chain, WP2Shell, allows attackers to fully compromise vulnerable WordPress sites without authentication. ThreatMon IntelHub has released a free detection tool to help identify exposed instances. 🔎 Check your site: ThreatMon IntelHub - Free Security Tools The vulnerability chain 🔸 CVE-2026-63030 – Route confusion in the REST /batch/v1 endpoint 🔸 CVE-2026-60137 – SQL Injection via WP_Query::author__not_in Potential impact An unauthenticated attacker can: ✅ Verify the SQL injection remotely ✅ Create a new administrator account ✅ Upload a malicious plugin ✅ Execute arbitrary commands on the server ✅ Achieve full site compromise Affected versions: WordPress 6.8.0 – 7.0.1 About the detection tool ✔️ Detection-only (non-intrusive) ✔️ No account required ✔️ Free to use Recommended actions 🔹 Update WordPress to the latest patched release immediately. 🔹 Review recently created administrator accounts. 🔹 Audit installed and active plugins for anything unfamiliar. 🔹 Restrict access to /wp-json/batch/v1 and ?rest_route=/batch/v1 at the edge until systems are patched. ⏱️ It takes less than 10 seconds to check whether your site is exposed. #WordPress #CyberSecurity #ThreatIntelligence #CVE #WP2Shell #SQLInjection #PreAuth #RCE
posts.text_zh: 已固定：🚨 關鍵的 WordPress 預授權漏洞利用鏈：WP2Shell 新揭露的漏洞利用鏈 WP2Shell 允許攻擊者在無需身份驗證的情況下完全破壞易受攻擊的 WordPress 網站。 ThreatMon IntelHub 發布了免費檢測工具來幫助識別暴露的實例。 🔎 檢查您的網站：ThreatMon IntelHub - 免費安全工具 漏洞鏈 🔸 CVE-2026-63030 – REST /batch/v1 端點中的路由混亂 🔸 CVE-2026-60137 – 透過 WP_Query::author _in 虛擬性注入 ✅ 建立新的管理員帳戶✅ 上傳惡意外掛程式 ✅ 在伺服器上執行任意指令 ✅ 實作全站入侵 受影響版本：WordPress 6.8.0 – 7.0.1 關於偵測工具 ✔️ 僅有（非侵入式） ✔ 🔹 查看最近建立的管理員帳戶。 🔹 審核已安裝和活動的插件是否有任何不熟悉的情況。 🔹 限制對邊緣的 /wp-json/batch/v1 和 ?rest_route=/batch/v1 的訪問，直到系統得到修補。 ⏱️不到10秒即可檢查您的網站是否有曝光。 #WordPress #Cyber​​Security #ThreatIntelligence #CVE #WP2Shell #SQLInjection #PreAuth #RCE
