posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged Just Eat Database Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing approximately 90 million Just Eat user records on a cybercrime forum. According to the listing, the alleged dataset includes: * User IDs * Email addresses * Password hashes * Full names * Country information * Currency codes * Account types * Membership dates * Email verification status * Campaign activity * Additional account metadata The post includes a sample of the purported database but does not provide sufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity, origin, or recency of the data. Daily Dark Web has not confirmed that the data originated from a compromise of Just Eat or Just Eat http://Takeaway.com. Analyst Note: Large consumer database claims are common on cybercrime forums. Many are recycled, aggregated from previous breaches, or artificially inflated. Organizations and users should wait for technical validation before assuming a new compromise has occurred. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #JustEat
posts.text_zh: 🚨 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳 Just Eat 資料庫 一名威脅行為者正在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳他們聲稱包含約 9000 萬條 Just Eat 用戶記錄的資料庫。根據清單，涉嫌的資料集包括： * 使用者 ID * 電子郵件地址 * 密碼雜湊 * 全名 * 國家資訊 * 貨幣代碼 * 帳戶類型 * 會員日期 * 電子郵件驗證狀態 * 活動活動 * 其他帳戶元資料 此貼文包含據稱資料庫的樣本，但沒有提供足夠的證據來獨立驗證資料的真實性、來源或新近性。 Daily Dark Web 尚未證實這些資料源自 Just Eat 或 Just Eat http://Takeaway.com 的外洩。分析師註釋：大型消費者資料庫索賠在網路犯罪論壇上很常見。許多是回收的、從以前的違規行為中匯總的，或者是人為誇大的。組織和使用者應等待技術驗證，然後再假設發生新的攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #JustEat

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 Alleged http://Stickers-Moto.fr Database Posted on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor has published what they describe as a small SQL database belonging to http://Stickers-Moto.fr, a French online retailer specializing in motorcycle stickers and accessories. According to the forum post, the leaked files allegedly include: * User records (Users.csv) * Order history (Commandes.csv) * Session-related data * Customer account information The post suggests the dataset is relatively small and includes sample records from multiple CSV files. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the leaked data or confirmed that it originated from a compromise of http://Stickers-Moto.fr. Analyst Note: Even small e-commerce database leaks can expose valuable customer information that enables phishing, credential stuffing, and account takeover attacks, particularly if users have reused passwords across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 據稱 http://Stickers-Moto.fr 資料庫發佈在網路犯罪論壇上 一名威脅行為者發布了他們所描述的屬於 http://Stickers-Moto.fr 的小型 SQL 資料庫，這是一家專門從事摩托車貼紙和配件的法國線上零售商。根據論壇帖子，洩漏的文件據稱包括： * 使用者記錄 (Users.csv) * 訂單歷史記錄 (Commandes.csv) * 會話相關資料 * 客戶帳戶資訊 此帖子表明資料集相對較小，包含來自多個 CSV 檔案的範例記錄。截至撰寫本文時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證洩漏資料的真實性，也未確認其源自 http://Stickers-Moto.fr 的洩漏。分析師註釋：即使是小型電子商務資料庫洩漏也可能會暴露有價值的客戶訊息，從而導致網路釣魚、撞庫和帳戶接管攻擊，特別是當用戶在多個服務中重複使用密碼時。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 Alleged CECyTE Tabasco Database Leaked A threat actor has posted what they claim is the full database of CECyTE Tabasco (Colegio de Estudios Científicos y Tecnológicos del Estado de Tabasco), a public educational institution in Mexico. According to the post, the dataset allegedly includes: * RFC (Mexican Tax ID) * CURP (National ID) * Gmail/email addresses * Usernames * Password hashes * Full names and related account information The listing references the institution's website (http://cecytab.edu.mx) and advertises the database as a complete dump. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the data or confirmed whether it originated from a compromise of CECyTE Tabasco. Analyst Note: Educational institutions continue to be attractive targets due to the large volume of student, faculty, and administrative records they maintain. Even when passwords are stored as hashes, exposed identity data such as CURP and RFC can significantly increase the risk of identity theft and phishing. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 據稱 CECyTE Tabasco 資料庫洩露 威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱的墨西哥公立教育機構 CECyTE Tabasco (Colegio de Estudios Científicos y Tecnológicos del Estado de Tabasco) 的完整資料庫。根據該帖子，該資料集據稱包括： * RFC（墨西哥稅號） * CURP（國民身分證） * Gmail/電子郵件地址 * 使用者名稱 * 密碼雜湊 * 全名和相關帳戶資訊 此清單引用了該機構的網站 (http://cecytab.edu.mx) 並將資料庫宣傳為完整的轉儲。截至本文撰寫時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證資料的真實性或確認其是否源自 CECyTE Tabasco 的妥協。分析師註釋：教育機構仍然是有吸引力的目標，因為它們保存大量的學生、教師和行政記錄。即使密碼儲存為雜湊值，暴露的身份資料（例如 CURP 和 RFC）也會顯著增加身分盜竊和網路釣魚的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.text: Was laying in bed this morning thinking of Satya Nadella (CEO of Microsoft). He makes me feel warm and fuzzy inside. I'm so excited to hear about the new additions to Windows next quarter. It's going to be more features we can use for malware. I'm so excited. He's awesome
posts.text_zh: 今天早上躺在床上想著薩蒂亞·納德拉（微軟執行長）。他讓我內心感到溫暖和模糊。我很高興聽到下個季度 Windows 的新增功能。我們將有更多可用於惡意軟體的功能。我太激動了。他太棒了

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇮🇩 Alleged Indonesian Government Cyber Division Access Offered for Sale A threat actor is advertising what they claim is access to an Indonesian government cyber division/police environment on a cybercrime forum. According to the listing: * Claimed target: Indonesian Government Cyber Division / Police * Access type: Unspecified network or system access * Asking price: $300 * Escrow services accepted * Buyers instructed to contact the seller privately The listing provides virtually no technical details, proof of access, screenshots, or evidence supporting the claim. As a result, the authenticity, scope, and impact of the alleged access cannot be independently verified. Analyst Note: Government access advertisements frequently appear on cybercrime forums, but many are fraudulent, outdated, or significantly exaggerated. Organizations should treat such listings as potential early warning indicators while awaiting technical validation or official confirmation. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇩 據稱出售印尼政府網路部門的存取權限 威脅行為者正在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳他們聲稱可以存取印尼政府網路部門/警察環境的內容。根據清單： * 聲稱的目標：印尼政府網路部門/警察 * 存取類型：未指定的網路或系統存取 * 要價：300 美元 * 接受託管服務 * 買家被指示私下聯絡賣家 該清單幾乎沒有提供技術細節、存取證明、螢幕截圖或支持該聲明的證據。因此，所指控的訪問的真實性、範圍和影響無法獨立驗證。分析師註釋：政府訪問廣告經常出現在網路犯罪論壇上，但許多廣告都是欺詐性的、過時的或嚴重誇大的。組織應將此類清單視為潛在的預警指標，同時等待技術驗證或官方確認。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: AI can write code. AI can generate reports. AI can solve complex problems. But that Excel workbook created in 2013? That's protected by ancient magic. #DDW #AI #Excel #TechHumor
posts.text_zh: AI可以寫程式碼。人工智慧可以產生報告。人工智慧可以解決複雜的問題。但是 2013 年創建的 Excel 工作簿呢？它受到古老魔法的保護。 #DDW #AI #Excel #TechHumor

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇻🇳 Alleged Database from Vietnamese Website Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a fresh database from **http://wasaki.vn**, a Vietnam-based website. According to the sample shared in the listing, the dataset allegedly includes: * User IDs * Usernames * Password hashes * Email addresses * Display names * Registration timestamps * Account activation keys * User roles * WordPress account metadata The exposed schema appears consistent with a WordPress user table, suggesting the listing may contain user account information and administrative accounts. However, the authenticity, origin, and recency of the dataset have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from the organization regarding a security incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: WordPress-based websites remain frequent targets for attackers exploiting vulnerable plugins, themes, weak credentials, or outdated installations. Even when passwords are hashed, exposed account databases can facilitate credential stuffing, phishing, and further attacks if password reuse is involved. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Vietnam
posts.text_zh: 🇻🇳 據稱來自越南網站的資料庫在網路犯罪論壇上發布廣告 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱來自越南網站 **http://wasaki.vn** 的新資料庫。根據清單中共享的樣本，該資料集據稱包括： * 使用者 ID * 使用者名稱 * 密碼雜湊值 * 電子郵件地址 * 顯示名稱 * 註冊時間戳 * 帳戶啟動金鑰 * 使用者角色 * WordPress 帳戶元資料 暴露的架構與 WordPress 使用者表一致，表示該清單可能包含使用者帳戶資訊和管理帳戶。然而，資料集的真實性、來源和新近性尚未得到獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，該組織尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的安全事件。分析師註釋：基於 WordPress 的網站仍然是攻擊者利用易受攻擊的外掛程式、主題、弱憑證或過時安裝的常見目標。即使密碼經過雜湊處理，如果涉及密碼重複使用，暴露的帳戶資料庫也可能促進憑證填充、網路釣魚和進一步的攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Vietnam

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇺🇸 Alleged Database from Arizona Caregiver Training Platform Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a fresh database from **http://online.arizonacaregivertraining.net**, an online caregiver training platform. According to the sample shared in the listing, the dataset allegedly contains: * User IDs * Usernames * Password hashes * Email addresses * First and last names * Identification numbers * Phone numbers * Institutional and department information * Physical addresses * City and country * Language and timezone settings * Account status and policy information The post includes a sample of the alleged records and download links. However, the authenticity, origin, and recency of the dataset have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from the organization regarding a security incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: Online education and certification platforms often store large amounts of personally identifiable information (PII). If confirmed, a compromise of this nature could expose users to credential stuffing, phishing, and identity theft, particularly if passwords were reused across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA
posts.text_zh: 🇺🇸 據稱來自亞利桑那州護理人員培訓平台的資料庫在網路犯罪論壇上刊登廣告 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱來自線上護理人員培訓平台 **http://online.arizonacaregivertraining.net** 的新資料庫。根據清單中共享的樣本，該資料集據稱包含： * 使用者 ID * 使用者名稱 * 密碼雜湊值 * 電子郵件地址 * 名字和姓氏 * 身分證號碼 * 電話號碼 * 機構和部門資訊 * 實體地址 * 城市和國家 * 語言和時區設定 * 帳戶狀態和政策資訊 該貼文包括涉嫌記錄和下載連結的樣本。然而，資料集的真實性、來源和新近性尚未得到獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，該組織尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的安全事件。分析師附註：線上教育和認證平台通常會儲存大量個人識別資訊（PII）。如果得到證實，這種性質的妥協可能會讓使用者面臨撞庫、網路釣魚和身分盜竊的風險，特別是在多個服務中重複使用密碼的情況下。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 400,327 Mexican Government Supplier Records Allegedly Exposed A threat actor is claiming that an exposed database belonging to **DIF Tamaulipas** (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia), a family services agency under the Government of Tamaulipas, Mexico, contains information on more than **400,000 supplier registrations**. According to the post, the exposed records allegedly include: * Supplier names (individuals and companies) * Mexican Tax IDs (RFC) * Full physical addresses * Municipalities and states * Legal representative names * Business categories * Contact phone numbers * Email addresses * Internal registration numbers The actor claims the database was accessible without authentication and provides a description of the exposed fields. However, the authenticity of the data, the exposure method, and whether the database remains publicly accessible have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there has been no public confirmation from DIF Tamaulipas regarding the alleged exposure. Analyst Note: Government supplier databases often contain sensitive business and personally identifiable information. If confirmed, exposures of this nature can increase the risk of procurement fraud, business email compromise (BEC), identity theft, and targeted phishing campaigns against registered vendors. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 400,327 條墨西哥政府供應商記錄據稱遭到洩露 威脅行為者聲稱，屬於墨西哥塔毛利帕斯州政府下屬家庭服務機構 **DIF Tamaulipas** (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia) 的資料庫包含超過 **400,000 個供應商註冊**的資訊。根據該帖子，據稱暴露的記錄包括： * 供應商名稱（個人和公司） * 墨西哥稅號 (RFC) * 完整的實際地址 * 市和州 * 法定代表人姓名 * 業務類別 * 聯繫電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 內部註冊號碼 攻擊者聲稱無需驗證即可訪問資料庫，並提供了暴露欄位的描述。然而，資料的真實性、曝光方式以及資料庫是否仍可公開存取尚未獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，DIF Tamaulipas 尚未公開證實所謂的曝光事件。分析師註釋：政府供應商資料庫通常包含敏感的商業和個人識別資訊。如果得到證實，這種性質的暴露可能會增加採購詐欺、商業電子郵件洩露 (BEC)、身份盜竊和針對註冊供應商的有針對性的網路釣魚活動的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇮🇩 Alleged Indonesian National Vaccine Database Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a second database from Indonesia's national vaccine system. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly contains: * National Identification Numbers (NIK) * Full names * Places and dates of birth * Residential addresses * Gender * Telephone numbers * District and subdistrict information * Administrative records * Creation and update timestamps The forum post describes the data as a "second database" and includes a sample of the alleged records. However, the authenticity, origin, and scope of the dataset have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from Indonesian authorities regarding a breach matching these claims. Analyst Note: Government health databases remain attractive targets due to the volume of personally identifiable information they contain. However, threat actors frequently repackage or relist previously leaked datasets, making independent validation essential before drawing conclusions. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇩 據稱印尼國家疫苗資料庫在網路犯罪論壇上刊登廣告 一名威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱是印尼國家疫苗系統的第二個資料庫。根據清單，該資料集據稱包含： * 國民身分證號碼 (NIK) * 全名 * 出生地點和日期 * 居住地址 * 性別 * 電話號碼 * 區和分區資訊 * 行政記錄 * 建立和更新時間戳 該論壇帖子將這些資料描述為“第二個資料庫”，並包含了所謂記錄的樣本。然而，資料集的真實性、來源和範圍尚未得到獨立驗證。截至本文撰寫時，印尼當局尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的違規行為。分析師註釋：政府健康資料庫仍然是有吸引力的目標，因為它們包含大量的個人識別資訊。然而，威脅行為者經常重新打包或重新列出先前洩漏的資料集，因此在得出結論之前必須進行獨立驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇬🇹 Alleged Guatemalan Citizen Database Advertised with Election-Related Claims A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing personal information on Guatemalan citizens, while also alleging, without providing evidence, that the data was used to manipulate Guatemala's 2023 elections. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly contains: * National identification numbers * Full names * Dates of birth * Tax identification numbers * Email addresses * Profile photographs (for some individuals) The post includes a sample of the alleged data and download links. However, the authenticity of the dataset and the accompanying claims regarding election manipulation have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no publicly available evidence confirming that this dataset was involved in Guatemala's 2023 election process or that it originated from an election-related system. Analyst Note: Threat actors frequently attach sensational political narratives to leaked datasets to increase visibility and perceived value. The existence of a dataset does not substantiate broader claims of election fraud or interference, which require independent forensic and investigative evidence. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Guatemala
posts.text_zh: 🇬🇹 涉嫌危地馬拉公民資料庫發布與選舉相關的聲明 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱包含危地馬拉公民個人資訊的資料庫，同時在沒有提供證據的情況下聲稱這些資料被用來操縱危地馬拉 2023 年選舉。根據清單，該資料集據稱包含： * 國民身分證號碼 * 全名 * 出生日期 * 稅務識別號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 個人資料照片（針對某些個人） 該貼文包含所指控資料的樣本和下載連結。然而，數據集的真實性以及隨附的有關選舉操縱的說法尚未得到獨立驗證。截至本文撰寫時，沒有公開證據證實該資料集參與了危地馬拉 2023 年的選舉過程或源自與選舉相關的系統。分析師註釋：威脅行為者經常將聳人聽聞的政治敘事附加到洩漏的資料集中，以提高可見性和感知價值。資料集的存在並不能證實更廣泛的選舉詐欺或乾擾指控，這需要獨立的法證和調查證據。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Guatemala

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇷 Alleged 20,000-Record Database from Brazilian E-Commerce Site Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a fresh database from **http://lojanegociosdigital.com.br**, a Brazilian e-commerce platform, containing approximately **20,000 customer records**. According to the listing and sample, the dataset allegedly includes: * Customer IDs * Billing email addresses * Order and transaction IDs * Payment method details * Order status and timestamps * Billing and IP addresses * Currency and tax information * WooCommerce order metadata The forum post labels the dataset as a recent leak and requires forum credits to access the download. However, the authenticity, origin, and freshness of the data have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from the organization regarding a security incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: Smaller e-commerce platforms running WooCommerce remain frequent targets for attackers exploiting vulnerable plugins, weak administrative credentials, or outdated software. Until independently validated, the claimed compromise should be treated as unverified. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Brazil
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇷 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳巴西電子商務網站的 20,000 條記錄資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱來自巴西電子商務平台 **http://lojanegociosdigital.com.br** 的新資料庫，其中包含大約 **20,000 條客戶記錄**。根據清單和樣本，該資料集據稱包括： * 客戶 ID * 帳單電子郵件地址 * 訂單和交易 ID * 付款方式詳細資訊 * 訂單狀態和時間戳 * 帳單和 IP 位址 * 貨幣和稅務資訊 * WooCommerce 訂單元資料 論壇貼文將資料集標記為最近洩露，並需要論壇積分才能存取下載。然而，數據的真實性、來源和新鮮度尚未得到獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，該組織尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的安全事件。分析師註釋：經營 WooCommerce 的小型電子商務平台仍然是攻擊者利用易受攻擊的插件、薄弱的管理憑證或過時的軟體的常見目標。在經過獨立驗證之前，所聲稱的妥協應被視為未經驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #巴西

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Chat, big shenanigans are afoot. Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins, one of the individuals behind the "BlockBlasters" steam malware campaign, also social engineered people online by pretending to be a woman. Wilkins, and a currently unlisted number of people, worked to spearphish people who owned cryptocurrency. They published a fake game on Steam named "BlockBlasters" which received international attention for crypto draining a terminally ill cancer patient. It turns out Wilkins also impersonated a person named @sibeleth That girl who was flirting with you, asking about how much money you hold in crypto, was actually a 21 year old African American man
posts.text_zh: 聊天，大惡作劇正在進行中。 Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins 是「BlockBlasters」蒸氣惡意軟體活動的幕後黑手之一，他也透過假裝女性對網路進行社交工程。威爾金斯和目前未列出的一些人致力於對擁有加密貨幣的人進行魚叉式網路釣魚。他們在 Steam 上發布了一款名為「BlockBlasters」的假遊戲，該遊戲因用加密貨幣耗盡末期癌症患者的生命而受到國際關注。事實證明，威爾金斯還冒充了一個名叫@sibeleth 的人，那個與你調情、詢問你持有多少錢的加密貨幣的女孩實際上是一名 21 歲的非裔美國男子

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Ecopetrol confirms cyberattack affecting approximately 3,300 accounts Colombia’s state-owned energy company Ecopetrol confirmed a cyber incident impacting roughly 3,300 user accounts. The company acknowledged unauthorized access but stated that operational systems were not affected. Underground actors are already attempting to capitalize on the incident with breach-related discussions. #DDW #ecopetrol #colombia #cyberattack
posts.text_zh: Ecopetrol 證實網路攻擊影響了約 3,300 個帳戶 哥倫比亞國有能源公司 Ecopetrol 確認了一次網路事件，影響了約 3,300 個使用者帳戶。該公司承認未經授權的訪問，但表示作業系統沒有受到影響。地下組織已經嘗試利用該事件進行與違規相關的討論。 #DDW #ecopetrol #colombia #cyberattack

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🍕🍔 Alleged 95 Million Uber Eats User Database Offered for Sale A threat actor has advertised what they claim is a database containing records for more than 95 million Uber Eats users. The forum listing provides only a brief description and limited sample data, without disclosing technical details about the alleged source of the information or when the data was obtained. At this stage, the post does not provide sufficient evidence to verify: * The authenticity of the dataset * Whether the data originated from Uber Eats * Whether the records are current or compiled from previous leaks Neither Uber Eats nor Uber has publicly acknowledged any incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: High-profile brands are frequently used in cybercrime marketplace listings to attract buyers. Claims involving tens of millions of records should be treated with caution until independent verification confirms the data's authenticity and origin. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Uber
posts.text_zh: 🍕🍔 據稱出售 9500 萬 Uber Eats 優食用戶資料庫 威脅行為者宣傳了他們聲稱包含超過 9500 萬 Uber Eats 優食用戶記錄的資料庫。論壇列表僅提供簡短描述和有限的樣本數據，沒有透露有關所謂資訊來源或數據獲取時間的技術細節。現階段，該貼文沒有提供足夠的證據來驗證： * 資料集的真實性 * 資料是否源自 Uber Eats * 這些記錄是最新的還是根據先前的洩漏彙編而成 Uber Eats 和 Uber 都沒有公開承認任何與這些說法相符的事件。分析師註：網路犯罪市場清單中經常使用知名品牌來吸引買家。在獨立驗證確認資料的真實性和來源之前，應謹慎對待涉及數千萬筆記錄的索賠。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Uber

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 Mexican Traffic Authority Database Allegedly Exposed A threat actor has advertised what they claim is the complete driver's license database and management platform for the Traffic Police of Baja California Sur, Mexico. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly contains records for approximately 325,000 individuals and includes access to the associated license management system. The post claims the database contains fields such as: * Driver's license type and number * Full name * RFC and CURP identifiers * License issuance details * License status * Pension status * Social Security number * Residential address * Additional personal information At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and no official statement has been issued by the Baja California Sur authorities regarding the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Government licensing databases contain highly sensitive personal information that can facilitate identity theft, fraud, and targeted social engineering. Claims involving both database access and administrative systems should be treated as high priority until independently verified. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 墨西哥交通管理局資料庫涉嫌暴露 威脅行為者宣傳了他們聲稱是墨西哥南下加利福尼亞州交通警察的完整駕駛執照資料庫和管理平台。根據清單，該資料集據稱包含約 325,000 人的記錄，並包括對相關許可證管理系統的存取。該貼文聲稱資料庫包含以下欄位： * 駕照類型和號碼 * 全名 * RFC 和 CURP 識別碼 * 駕照發放詳細資料 * 駕照狀態 * 退休金狀況 * 社會安全號碼 * 居住地址 * 其他個人資訊 截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到證實，南下加州當局尚未就所指控的事件發布任何官方聲明。分析師註釋：政府許可資料庫包含高度敏感的個人訊息，可能會促進身分盜竊、詐欺和有針對性的社會工程。在獨立驗證之前，涉及資料庫存取和管理系統的索賠應被視為高優先級。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.text_zh: R 致@vxunderground：tldr，你向我發送惡意軟體很好，有時會發生非常有趣的事情。感謝您向我發送惡意軟體。另外，我真的想指出，我沒有做任何調查工作或其他什麼，我只是對其進行逆向工程，解釋它是如何工作的，記錄了一些 IP 或加密錢包，僅此而已。我只是惡意軟體的人。我什麼都不是。 BlockBlasters 出現後，有很多人聚集在一起，做了非常酷的事情並幫助了很多人。許多人公開分享識別人員身分的資訊。我只是用棍子敲打東西並看著貓

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Maybe a year ago, I don't remember, a game appeared on Steam called BlockBlasters. BlockBlasters was actually malware, and it gained recognition primarily because it was used to crypto drain a terminally ill cancer patient. I was the first person (to the best of my knowledge) to reverse engineer BlockBlasters after people began notifying me about the game on Steam potentially being malware. It ended up being a huge deal, primarily because BlockBlasters was used for targeted crypto draining campaigns. Anyway, the FBI has begun arresting the people. The first person arrested was 21 year old Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins, based out of Florida. I assume more arrests are coming. This person specifically made $220,000 from the malware campaign, with $32,000 coming from a terminally ill (now deceased) cancer patient.
posts.text_zh: 也許一年前，我不記得了，Steam 上出現了一款名為 BlockBlasters 的遊戲。 BlockBlasters 實際上是惡意軟體，它獲得認可主要是因為它被用來加密末期癌症患者。在人們開始通知我 Steam 上的遊戲可能是惡意軟體後，我是第一個（據我所知）對 BlockBlasters 進行逆向工程的人。這最終成為了一件大事，主要是因為 BlockBlasters 被用於有針對性的加密貨幣耗盡活動。不管怎樣，聯邦調查局已經開始逮捕這些人了。第一名被捕者是佛羅裡達州 21 歲的 Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins。我猜還會有更多人被逮捕。此人從惡意軟體活動中具體賺取了 22 萬美元，其中 32,000 美元來自一位身患絕症（現已死亡）的癌症患者。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Sale of 4M São Paulo Student Records A darkweb forum post reveals that a threat actor known as 'Confia Company' is allegedly selling a database containing personal information of over 4 million students from the São Paulo State Department of Education (SEDUC-SP). The listing, posted on July 16, 2026, claims the data was extracted directly from the API of 'Sala do Futuro,' the official educational platform used by the state's public school system. According to the post, the dataset covers approximately 1,480 cities within São Paulo state and includes sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) for each student. The alleged exposed fields include: * Student ID and RA (Registration Number) * Full name * CPF (Brazilian national ID) and RG (state ID) * Date of birth and gender * Email addresses * Parents' full names * Complete home addresses (street, number, neighborhood, ZIP code, city, state) * Geolocation coordinates (latitude/longitude) * Class enrollment details The listing provides sample records showing data for students in cities such as São José dos Campos, São Paulo, Araraquara, and São Caetano do Sul, confirming the presence of CPFs, parent names, and precise address details. The actor invites interested buyers to contact them via Telegram or Session for pricing. São Paulo State is the largest education system in Brazil, serving millions of students annually. The exposure of such granular data, including geolocation and national identification numbers, poses significant risks of identity theft, social engineering, and physical safety threats to minors and their families. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by SEDUC-SP or security researchers. #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Brazil #SaoPaulo #PII #DarkWeb #StudentData
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱出售 400 萬份聖保羅學生記錄 一篇暗網論壇帖子透露，一個名為“Confia Company”的威脅行為者涉嫌出售包含聖保羅州教育部 (SEDUC-SP) 超過 400 萬學生個人信息的數據庫。該清單發佈於 2026 年 7 月 16 日，聲稱數據直接從該州公立學校系統使用的官方教育平台「Sala do Futuro」的 API 中提取。根據該帖子，該資料集涵蓋聖保羅州內約 1,480 個城市，並包含每個學生的敏感個人識別資訊 (PII)。據稱暴露的欄位包括： * 學生 ID 和 RA（註冊號碼） * 全名 * CPF（巴西國民 ID）和 RG（州 ID） * 出生日期和性別 * 電子郵件地址 * 父母的全名 * 完整的家庭住址（街道、號碼、社區、郵政編碼、城市、州） * 地理位置座標（緯度/經度） * 班級註冊資訊該清單提供了範例記錄，顯示了聖若澤多斯坎普斯、聖奧多斯坎普斯等城市的學生資料聖保羅、阿拉拉誇拉和南聖卡埃塔諾，確認 CPF 的存在、父母姓名和準確的地址詳細資料。演員邀請有興趣的買家透過 Telegram 或 Session 與他們聯繫以獲取定價。聖保羅州是巴西最大的教育系統，每年為數百萬名學生提供服務。此類精細資料（包括地理位置和國民身分證號碼）的暴露會為未成年人及其家人帶來身分盜竊、社會工程和人身安全威脅的重大風險。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 SEDUC-SP 或安全研究人員的獨立驗證。 #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #巴西 #SaoPaulo #PII #DarkWeb #StudentData

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: I have made the decision to suspend Cyber Toufan, the hacktivist group, from my Mastodon instance. They only had one post. This is not an expression of support for Israeli government, who the UN say have committed genocide in Gaza. The UK government has announced later this week they will designate the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) as a threat to national security as part of the National Security (State Threats) Act, and I cannot be sure Cyber Toufan aren't connected to them.
posts.text_zh: 我已决定从我的 Mastodon 实例中暂停 Cyber​​ Toufan（黑客组织）。他們只有一個職位。这并不是对以色列政府的支持，联合国称以色列政府在加沙犯下了种族灭绝罪。英國政府本週稍後宣布，作為《國家安全（國家威脅）法案》的一部分，他們將指定伊斯蘭革命衛隊 (IRGC) 對國家安全構成威脅，我不能確定 Cyber​​ Toufan 與他們沒有聯繫。

posts.text: Following up the Delinea situation, they have another planned outage this weekend to update to version 26.1 HF2 of the product. https:// status.delinea.com/incidents/m 2gzxlt6rs6g HF2 isn't available yet: https:// docs.delinea.com/online-help/c loud-suite/release-notes/cloud-suite/26.1.htm#ResolvedIssuesin261HF1 The prior outage situation for "security patches" never had a CVE allocated or details about what was patched. posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims 605M Pakistan CNIC Records Leaked on Darkweb A darkweb forum post reveals the alleged exposure of a massive dataset containing 605 million rows of Pakistani citizen data, combining national identity records with historical telecom information. The actor, operating under the handle "PKMKB," claims to have compiled this dataset over more than a decade by merging older leaked telecom directories and provincial agency breaches. According to the listing, the exposed data includes highly sensitive Personally Identifiable Information (PII) and tracking details: * **Core National Identity Data:** 13-digit Computerized National Identity Card (CNIC) numbers, full legal names, gender, dates of birth, and family tree links including parentage. * **Telecom Trackers:** Active and historically registered mobile numbers mapped to specific IDs, SIM card issuance dates with exact activation timestamps, and network operator data for carriers such as Jazz, Telenor, Zong, and Ufone. * **Locational Data:** Permanent and temporary home and work addresses submitted during CNIC registrations, along with city and district routing information. The post alleges that half of the dataset is available for free via a Telegram bot, while the full archive is offered for sale. Pakistan’s National Database and Registration Authority (NADRA) manages the CNIC system for a population of over 240 million people. While the claimed volume of 605 million rows exceeds the country's population, the actor attributes this to overlapping historical records and multi-generational telecom mappings. If authentic, the exposure of comprehensive identity and telecom records could facilitate large-scale identity theft, financial fraud, and targeted harassment across Pakistan. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by NADRA or security researchers. #DataBreach #Pakistan #CNIC #IdentityTheft #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱 6.05 億巴基斯坦 CNIC 記錄在暗網上洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子揭露了包含 6.05 億行巴基斯坦公民數據的海量數據集的洩露，該數據集將國民身份記錄與歷史電信信息相結合。該攻擊者以「PKMKB」為名，聲稱透過合併舊的洩漏的電信目錄和省級機構的違規行為，在十多年來編制了該資料集。根據清單，暴露的資料包括高度敏感的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和追蹤詳細資料：* **核心國民身分資料：** 13 位電腦化國民身分證 (CNIC) 號碼、法定全名、性別、出生日期以及包括出身的家譜連結。 * **電信追蹤器：** 映射到特定 ID 的活躍和歷史註冊手機號碼、具有準確激活時間戳的 SIM 卡發行日期以及 Jazz、Telenor、Zong 和 Ufone 等運營商的網路運營商數據。 * **位置資料：** CNIC 註冊期間提交的永久和臨時家庭和工作地址，以及城市和地區的路線資訊。該貼文聲稱一半的資料集可透過 Telegram 機器人免費取得，而完整的檔案則可供出售。巴基斯坦國家資料庫和註冊局 (NADRA) 管理著超過 2.4 億人口的 CNIC 系統。雖然聲稱的 6.05 億行數據量超過了該國的人口數量，但該行為者將其歸因於重疊的歷史記錄和多代電信映射。如果屬實，全面的身份和電信記錄的暴露可能會助長巴基斯坦各地的大規模身份盜竊、金融詐欺和有針對性的騷擾。截至本報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 NADRA 或安全研究人員的獨立核實。 #DataBreach #巴基斯坦 #CNIC #IdentityTheft #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Sale of Coinbase Customer Data on Darkweb Forum A post on an underground forum alleges the availability of a database containing personal and financial information of Coinbase users. The actor claims the data, described as "2026 Crypto Leads," includes balance information and contact details for individuals worldwide. According to the listing, the dataset contains the following fields: * Name * Email * Address * Postal Code * City * Phone Number * International Phone Number * Confirmation Status * Company * Rent Information * Interest Details * Country * Crypto Platform * Crypto Balance The threat actor asserts that the source of this data is a combination of internal API leaks and compromised merchant processors. The post indicates that the data is available for purchase globally, with the seller requesting direct messages for further details. Coinbase is one of the largest cryptocurrency exchanges in the world, serving millions of users across numerous countries. A breach of this scale would represent a significant security incident for the fintech giant, potentially exposing sensitive financial profiles to fraudsters. At the time of reporting, Coinbase has not commented on the alleged leak, and the incident has not been independently verified.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱在暗網論壇上出售 Coinbase 客戶資料 地下論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱存在包含 Coinbase 用戶個人和財務資訊的資料庫。該行為者聲稱，這些被描述為「2026 Crypto Leads」的數據包括世界各地個人的餘額資訊和聯絡資訊。根據清單，該資料集包含以下欄位： * 姓名 * 電子郵件 * 地址 * 郵遞區號 * 城市 * 電話號碼 * 國際電話號碼 * 確認狀態 * 公司 * 租金資訊 * 興趣詳細資料 * 國家 * 加密平台 * 加密餘額 威脅行為者聲稱該資料的來源是內部 API 洩漏和受損的商家處理器的組合。該貼文表明，該數據可在全球範圍內購買，賣家需要直接發送訊息以獲取更多詳細資訊。 Coinbase 是世界上最大的加密貨幣交易所之一，為多個國家的數百萬用戶提供服務。對於這家金融科技巨頭來說，如此規模的違規行為將構成重大安全事件，並可能將敏感的財務資料暴露給詐欺者。截至發稿時，Coinbase 尚未對涉嫌洩密事件發表評論，該事件也尚未獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Leak of SpaceX Starshield Internal Architecture Document A post on an underground forum alleges the exposure of an internal technical document related to SpaceX’s Starshield program, a secure satellite constellation designed for government and defense applications. The listing claims to offer access to a 22-page document titled "Starshield Constellation Technical Baseline and Architecture Description," bearing the document number SPX-STARS HLD-LIN-2026-042 and dated June 12, 2026. The file is marked with watermarks indicating "SPACE PROPRIETARY / STARSHIELD PROGRAM / INTERNAL USE ONLY." According to the post, the document provides a detailed technical baseline and architecture description of the Starshield network. The actor claims the content covers several critical aspects of the system: * Constellation architecture and orbital design * Satellite bus design, subsystems, and physical characteristics * Payload integration and hosted payload capabilities * Secure communications and inter-satellite links * Ground segment and user terminal integration * Launch vehicles, deployment strategy, and on-orbit operations * Operational status, performance metrics, and lessons learned The listing describes the material as valuable for aerospace engineers, defense researchers, and investors, suggesting it offers rare insights into SpaceX’s secure satellite infrastructure. Starshield is a significant component of SpaceX’s broader strategy in the space and defense sectors, providing secure communications and Earth observation capabilities for government clients. If authentic, the exposure of such internal architectural details could provide adversaries with insights into the physical and operational design of secure satellite networks, potentially aiding in the development of countermeasures or targeted attacks against critical space infrastructure. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified, and the authenticity of the document remains unconfirmed.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱 SpaceX Starshield 內部架構文件被洩露 地下論壇上的一篇帖子聲稱，與 SpaceX Starshield 計劃相關的內部技術文件被曝光，該計劃是一個專為政府和國防應用而設計的安全衛星星座。該清單聲稱可以存取一份名為「Starshield Constellation Technical Baseline and Architecture Description」的 22 頁文件，文件編號為 SPX-STARS HLD-LIN-2026-042，日期為 2026 年 6 月 12 日。該文件標有浮水印，指示「太空專有/STARSHIELD 計劃/僅供內部使用」。貼文稱，該文件提供了 Starshield 網路的詳細技術基準和架構描述。該演員聲稱內容涵蓋了該系統的幾個關鍵方面： * 星座架構和軌道設計 * 衛星總線設計、子系統和物理特性 * 有效載荷集成和託管有效載荷能力 * 安全通信和衛星間鏈路 * 地面部分和用戶終端集成 * 運載火箭、部署策略和在航空操作工程師 運行狀態、性能指標和經驗教訓X的安全衛星基礎設施提供了罕見的見解。 Starshield 是 SpaceX 在太空和國防部門更廣泛戰略的重要組成部分，為政府客戶提供安全通訊和地球觀測能力。如果屬實，此類內部架構細節的暴露可以讓對手深入了解安全衛星網路的實體和操作設計，可能有助於制定針對關鍵太空基礎設施的對策或有針對性的攻擊。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實，該文件的真實性仍未得到證實。

posts.text: Regarding CVE-2026-56155, the in-the-wild ADFS vulnerability - the July patch just released does not fix the vulnerability. Instead it adds an audit log. The changes to harden the service and enforce protection will only apply with October 2026’s update applied. https:// support.microsoft.com/en-us/se rvicing/os/windows/docs/2026/07/kb5121391-cve-2026-56155-ad-fs-dkm-container-acl-hardening
posts.text_zh: 關於CVE-2026-56155，ADFS野外漏洞－剛發布的7月修補程式並沒有修復該漏洞。相反，它添加了審核日誌。強化服務和實施保護的變更僅適用於應用 2026 年 10 月的更新。 https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/se rvicing/os/windows/docs/2026/07/kb5121391-cve-2026-56155-ad-fs-dkm-container-acl-hardening

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 ShadowByt3$ Claims Breach of Sinar Mas Agribusiness, Exposes HR and Payroll Data A threat actor operating under the alias ShadowByt3$ claims to have breached Sinar Mas Agribusiness and Food (SMAF), a major subsidiary of the Indonesian conglomerate Sinar Mas Group. According to a post on an underground forum, the group alleges it gained access to the company’s workforce URL and is now exposing sensitive internal data after failing to receive a ransom payment. The actor alleges that the leak includes a wide range of sensitive employee data and corporate intellectual property. The post enumerates the following categories of exposed information: * **Government & Tax Identifiers:** Digital copies of Indonesian National ID Cards (KTP), Family Cards (KK), electronic tax cards (NPWP-Elektronik), salary declarations, and academic certificates. * **Corporate Payroll & Financial Logs:** Expense ledger spreadsheets, cash advance records, administrative transaction logs, and medical benefits forms for the Indonesian healthcare system (BPJS Kesehatan) and pension records. * **Talent Tracking & Strategy:** Executive talent cards for specific employees (Fitri Rahmiyani, Anton, and Ilyasa Deva Wirabuana), performance appraisals, and proprietary Balanced Scorecard alignment metrics. * **Internal HR Guides:** Internal toolkits for Performance Improvement Plans, exit checklists for various sectors (Refinery, Upstream, Corporate, Trading), and the 2023 SMAF Learning Catalogue. * **Workday Infrastructure:** Archives of Workday Knowledge bases, platform layout blueprints, corporate letterheads, and IT security procedures for handling locked user accounts. Sinar Mas Agribusiness and Food is one of the world’s largest producers of palm oil, supplying major global brands including Unilever, Nestlé, Procter & Gamble, Mondelēz International, and Johnson & Johnson. The threat actor claims that due to supply chain interdependencies, this breach also impacts these downstream partners, although no evidence of direct compromise at those companies was provided in the post. The data dump is reportedly hosted on MEGA, with mirrors on http://transfer.it and http://anonfilesnew.com, totaling 375.66MB. The actor states that the company was aware of the breach but failed to contact them, leading to the public exposure. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or confirmed by Sinar Mas Group.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 ShadowByt3$ 聲稱入侵金光農業企業，暴露人力資源和薪資數據 一個化名 ShadowByt3$ 的威脅行為者聲稱入侵了印度尼西亞金光集團的主要子公司金光農業食品公司 (SMAF)。根據地下論壇上的一篇帖子，該組織聲稱它獲得了該公司員工 URL 的訪問權限，並且在未能收到贖金後正在暴露敏感的內部數據。該行為者聲稱，洩漏的內容包括廣泛的敏感員工資料和公司智慧財產權。該貼文列舉了以下幾類暴露的資訊：* **政府和稅務識別碼：** 印尼國民身分證（KTP）、家庭卡（KK）、電子稅卡（NPWP-Elektronik）、薪資申報單和學歷證書的數位副本。 * **公司薪資和財務日誌：** 費用分類帳電子表格、現金預支記錄、管理交易日誌以及印尼醫療保健系統 (BPJS Kesehatan) 的醫療福利表和退休金記錄。 * **人才追蹤與策略：** 針對特定員工（Fitri Rahmiyani、Anton 和 Ilyasa Deva Wirabuana）的高階主管人才卡、績效評估和專有的平衡計分卡調整指標。 * **內部人力資源指南：** 績效改進計劃的內部工具包、各個部門（煉油廠、上游、企業、貿易）的退出清單以及 2023 年 SMAF 學習目錄。 * **Workday 基礎架構：** Workday 知識庫檔案、平台佈局藍圖、公司信箋以及用於處理鎖定使用者帳戶的 IT 安全程序。金光農業食品公司是全球最大的棕櫚油生產商之一，為聯合利華、雀巢、寶潔、億滋國際和強生等全球主要品牌供貨。威脅行為者聲稱，由於供應鏈的相互依賴性，這種違規行為也會影響這些下游合作夥伴，儘管貼文中沒有提供這些公司直接受到損害的證據。據報道，資料轉儲託管在 MEGA 上，鏡像位於 http://transfer.it 和 http://anonfilesnew.com 上，總計 375.66MB。該演員表示，該公司知道這項違規行為，但沒有聯繫他們，導致公眾曝光。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到安全研究人員的獨立核實或金光集團的確認。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Promotes "DarkMatter" Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) Affiliate Program A threat actor announced the launch of a Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) affiliate program named DarkMatter, targeting small, medium, and large enterprises. According to the post, the group states that it does not permit attacks against organizations located in the CIS region or the healthcare sector, while promoting long-term partnerships and operational support for affiliates. According to the advertisement, the threat actor provides affiliates with customized ransomware builds, dedicated Tor-based management panels, real-time callback reporting, encrypted communications, and ongoing operational support. The offering also supports multiple payload formats, including executable files, DLLs, PowerShell scripts, batch files, and memory-only (fileless) payloads, allowing affiliates to tailor deployments to different attack scenarios. The advertised ransomware is claimed to support a wide range of capabilities, including: - Configurable file encryption and deployment options - Active Directory integration and domain-wide propagation - Network spreading through SMB, PsExec, and Group Policy - Credential dumping and privilege impersonation - Defense evasion and anti-analysis techniques - Anti-debugging, anti-VM, and sandbox detection - Backup and shadow copy deletion - ESXi virtualization environment targeting - Tor-based victim portals for ransom negotiations #RaaS #ThreatIntelligence #DarkWeb
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者推廣「DarkMatter」勒索軟體即服務 (RaaS) 附屬計劃 威脅行為者宣布推出名為 DarkMatter 的勒索軟體即服務 (RaaS) 附屬計劃，針對小型、中型和大型企業。該貼文稱，該組織聲明不允許對位於獨聯體地區或醫療保健行業的組織進行攻擊，同時促進對附屬機構的長期合作夥伴關係和營運支援。根據廣告，威脅行為者為附屬機構提供客製化的勒索軟體版本、基於 Tor 的專用管理面板、即時回調報告、加密通訊和持續的營運支援。該產品還支援多種有效負載格式，包括可執行檔、DLL、PowerShell 腳本、批次檔和僅記憶體（無檔案）有效負載，允許分公司根據不同的攻擊場景自訂部署。宣傳的勒索軟體據稱支援多種功能，包括： - 可設定的檔案加密和部署選項 - Active Directory 整合和網域範圍傳播 - 透過 SMB、PsExec 和群組原則進行網路傳播 - 憑證轉儲和特權模擬 - 防禦規避和反分析技術 - 反偵錯、反虛擬機和沙匣偵測 - 備份和磁碟區副本版面複製和反分析技術 - 反偵錯、反虛擬機和沙匣偵測 - 備份和磁碟區複製版面紙 - ESXi 環境複製#ThreatIntelligence #DarkWeb

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Alleged TotalEnergies Customer Database Leak on Darkweb Forum A post on the Darkforums underground community claims to offer a database containing personal and account details of 20 million TotalEnergies customers for sale. The actor, operating under the handle @MrL33tH4, alleges that the dataset includes full information for residential clients in France. According to the listing, the database is priced at 650 euros. The seller provides a sample of the data structure, which reportedly contains the following fields: * Civilité (Title) * Nom (Last Name) * Prénom (First Name) * Téléphone (Phone Number) * Identifiant du point (Point Identifier) * fournisseur (Supplier) * Catégorie client (Client Category) * adresse (Address) * Code postal (Postal Code) * Commune (City/Municipality) * Formule tarifaire (Tariff Formula) * Calendrier Fournisseur (Supplier Calendar) * Puissance souscrite demandée (Subscribed Power Requested) * country The sample entries shown in the thread display French residential addresses, phone numbers, and specific energy consumption details, such as "Tarif BT <= 36kVA" and subscribed power levels like "6 kVA" or "9 kVA". The actor claims the source website is http://totalenergies.fr. TotalEnergies is a major multinational energy company headquartered in France, serving millions of customers globally. If authentic, the exposure of such detailed customer records including names, addresses, and phone numbers could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns, social engineering attacks, or identity theft against French residents. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by TotalEnergies or security researchers.
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ Darkweb 論壇上涉嫌 TotalEnergies 客戶資料庫洩露 Darkforums 地下社群上的一篇貼文聲稱提供一個包含 2000 萬 TotalEnergies 客戶個人和帳戶詳細資訊的資料庫可供出售。該攻擊者以 @MrL33tH4 為名進行操作，聲稱該資料集包含法國住宅客戶的完整資訊。根據清單，該資料庫售價為650歐元。賣家提供了資料結構樣本，據報導其中包含以下欄位： * Civilité（頭銜） * Nom（姓氏） * Prénom（名字） * Téléphone（電話號碼） * Identifiant du point（點識別碼） * fournisseur（供應商） * Catégorie client（客戶類別） Formula tarifaire（關稅公式）* Calendrier Fournisseur（供應商日曆）* Puissance souscritedemandée（請求的訂閱功率）*國家/地區線程中顯示的示例條目顯示法國住宅地址、電話號碼和特定能源消耗詳細信息，例如“Tarif BT <= 36kVA”和訂閱功率級別，例如“96 kVA”。該演員聲稱來源網站是 http://totalenergies.fr。 TotalEnergies 是一家總部位於法國的大型跨國能源公司，為全球數百萬客戶提供服務。如果真實，暴露此類詳細的客戶記錄（包括姓名、地址和電話號碼）可能會促進針對法國居民的有針對性的網路釣魚活動、社會工程攻擊或身分盜竊。截至本報告發布之時，TotalEnergies 或安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 40,000 Askari Bank Records Leaked on Darkweb A darkweb forum post claims that a database containing approximately 40,000 records from Askari Bank, one of Pakistan’s largest financial institutions, has been compromised and is available for sale. The actor alleges that the leak includes sensitive customer data such as national identification numbers (CNIC), full names, residential addresses, account numbers, and contact details. According to the listing, the exposed data fields include: * Bank name and branch name * CNIC / National ID * Customer Name * Address * Account number * Contact Number * Account Type (e.g., Saving A/C, Current A/C) The post provides sample entries showing customers from branches in Rawalpindi and Karachi, including specific street addresses and phone numbers. Askari Bank is a major player in Pakistan’s banking sector, with a significant retail and corporate customer base. If authentic, the exposure of CNICs alongside account numbers could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns, identity theft, and social engineering attacks against the bank's customers. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Askari Bank or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱 40,000 條阿斯卡里銀行記錄在暗網上洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱，包含巴基斯坦最大金融機構之一阿斯卡里銀行約 40,000 條記錄的數據庫已被洩露並可供出售。該行為者聲稱，洩露的內容包括敏感的客戶數據，例如國民身分證號碼 (CNIC)、全名、​​居住地址、帳號和聯絡資訊。根據清單，暴露的資料欄位包括： * 銀行名稱和分行名稱 * CNIC / 國民身分證 * 客戶姓名 * 地址 * 帳號 * 聯絡電話 * 帳戶類型（例如，儲蓄帳戶、目前帳戶） 該貼文提供了顯示來自拉瓦爾品第和卡拉奇分行的客戶的樣本條目，包括具體的街道地址和電話號碼。阿斯卡里銀行是巴基斯坦銀行業的主要參與者，擁有龐大的零售和企業客戶群。如果真實，CNIC 與帳號一起暴露可能會促進針對銀行客戶的有針對性的網路釣魚活動、身分盜竊和社會工程攻擊。截至本報告發布之時，Askari Bank 或第三方安全研究人員尚未對涉嫌違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: Group-IB Threat Intelligence has already identified 100+ ClickLock Stealer victims across 33 countries since May 2026, proving that macOS threats are evolving beyond rare, sophisticated attacks. The malware uses compromised WordPress infrastructure for payload delivery and self-deletes after execution, leaving minimal forensic traces. Read Group-IB's full technical breakdown here: https://link.group-ib.com/4gC4lHJ
posts.text_zh: R 致@GroupIB_TI：自 2026 年 5 月以來，Group-IB 威脅情報已在 33 個國家/地區識別出 100 多個 ClickLock Stealer 受害者，證明 macOS 威脅正在演變為超越罕見、複雜的攻擊。該惡意軟體使用受損的 WordPress 基礎設施進行有效負載傳輸，並在執行後自行刪除，留下最少的取證痕跡。請在此處閱讀 Group-IB 的完整技術細分：https://link.group-ib.com/4gC4lHJ

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: The #malware targets 8 browsers, 31 #cryptowallet extensions, 7 password managers, and 8 desktop wallet applications. Using a modular architecture, ClickLock Stealer employs a GSocket backdoor installer disguised as iCloud, a credential stealer, Keychain stealer, and crypto-focused harvester that extracts #blockchain addresses across 6 chains. All components exfiltrate data via #Telegram Bot API, while the backdoor provides persistent remote access.
posts.text_zh: R 至 @GroupIB_TI：#malware 的目標是 8 個瀏覽器、31 個 #cryptowallet 擴充功能、7 個密碼管理器和 8 個桌面錢包應用程式。 ClickLock Stealer 採用模組化架構，採用偽裝成 iCloud 的 GSocket 後門安裝程式、憑證竊取程式、鑰匙圈竊取程式和以加密貨幣為中心的收割機，可跨 6 個鏈提取 #blockchain 位址。所有元件都透過#Telegram Bot API 竊取數據，而後門則提供持久的遠端存取。

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: R to @GroupIB_TI: #ClickLockStealer implements a layered approach to credential theft. If a victim enters their password willingly, the attack completes in seconds. If they refuse, the #malware installs LaunchAgents for persistence and activates a kill-loop terminating Finder, Dock, SystemUIServer, and Terminal every 210 milliseconds, leaving only a fake password dialog on screen until #compliance is achieved. The same coercion technique forces approval of a macOS Keychain authorization prompt to extract Chrome's Safe Storage AES key.
posts.text_zh: R 致@GroupIB_TI：#ClickLockStealer 實作了一種分層的憑證竊取方法。如果受害者自願輸入密碼，攻擊將在幾秒鐘內完成。如果他們拒絕，#malware 會安裝 LaunchAgents 以實現持久性，並每 210 毫秒啟動一個終止循環，終止 Finder、Dock、SystemUIServer 和終端，只在螢幕上留下一個假密碼對話框，直到實作 #compliance。同樣的強制技術會強制批准 macOS 鑰匙圈授權提示，以擷取 Chrome 的安全儲存 AES 金鑰。

posts.name: GroupIB_TI
posts.text: A new #macOS stealer named #ClickLockStealer has been discovered with zero detections on VirusTotal, targeting users across Europe, North America, and MEA. The malware uses #ClickFix social engineering to trick victims into pasting a malicious command into Terminal, then forces password entry killing all visible applications until the user complies, acting as a "locker". The attack chain requires no exploits or elevated privileges to succeed. #ThreatIntel
posts.text_zh: 在 VirusTotal 上發現了一種名為 #ClickLockStealer 的新 #macOS 竊取程序，其目標是歐洲、北美和中東和非洲地區的用戶，檢測結果為零。該惡意軟體使用 #ClickFix 社交工程來誘騙受害者將惡意命令粘貼到終端中，然後強制輸入密碼以殺死所有可見應用程序，直到用戶遵守為止，充當“儲物櫃”。攻擊鏈無需利用任何漏洞或提升權限即可成功。 #威脅英特爾

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: Pretty funny Cursor issue - if you put a file named git.exe in a source code repo and open it in Cursor, it blindly runs said git.exe file https:// mindgard.ai/blog/cursor-0day-w hen-full-disclosure-becomes-the-only-protection-left
posts.text_zh: 非常有趣的遊標問題 - 如果您將一個名為 git.exe 的檔案放入原始程式碼儲存庫中並在遊標中開啟它，它會盲目地運行所述 git.exe 檔案 https://mindgard.ai/blog/cursor-0day-w hen-full-disclosure-becomes-the-only-protection-left

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 TeamPCP Claims GitHub Internal Repos and Source Code in Fire Sale A threat actor operating under the alias TeamPCP has posted a listing on an underground forum claiming to possess internal repositories and source code from GitHub. The post, dated July 14, 2026, describes the material as a "fire sale," suggesting an urgent attempt to liquidate the stolen assets. According to the statement, the exposed data includes: * Internal repositories * Source code GitHub is a critical component of the global software development infrastructure, hosting millions of public and private repositories for organizations ranging from small startups to major enterprises. A breach of this magnitude would represent a significant compromise of intellectual property and potentially expose vulnerabilities in widely used software libraries. If authentic, exposure of internal repositories could enable intellectual property theft and infrastructure targeting. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified. #DataBreach #SourceCodeLeak #GitHub #TeamPCP #SoftwareSecurity #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 TeamPCP 聲稱正在賤賣 GitHub 內部儲存庫和原始程式碼 一個化名 TeamPCP 的威脅行為者在地下論壇上發布了一份清單，聲稱擁有 GitHub 的內部儲存庫和原始程式碼。該貼文日期為 2026 年 7 月 14 日，將該資料描述為“賤賣”，暗示正在緊急嘗試清算被盜資產。根據聲明，暴露的數據包括： * 內部儲存庫 * 原始碼 GitHub 是全球軟體開發基礎設施的關鍵組成部分，為從小新創公司到大型企業等組織託管數百萬個公共和私人儲存庫。如此嚴重的違規行為將嚴重損害智慧財產權，並可能暴露廣泛使用的軟體庫中的漏洞。如果是真實的，內部儲存庫的暴露可能會導致智慧財產權盜竊和基礎設施攻擊。截至本報告發布之時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實。 #DataBreach #SourceCodeLeak #GitHub #TeamPCP #SoftwareSecurity #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims Breach of Venezuela's INEA, Exposing 115k Mariners' Data A darkweb forum post by the threat actor '[L4TAMFUCK3R$]' alleges a complete breach of the National Institute of Aquatic Spaces (INEA) in Venezuela. According to the listing, the actor claims to have obtained the personal data of 114,265 marine users and 13,485 maritime companies. The post provides proof-of-concept JSON snippets revealing highly sensitive Personally Identifiable Information (PII) and biometric data for individual mariners. The exposed data fields include: * Full names and surnames * Identity card numbers (Cédula de Identidad) * Home addresses and phone numbers * Email addresses * Detailed physical descriptions (height, skin color, hair color, eye color, facial features) * Civil status and nationality INEA is a critical government agency in Venezuela responsible for regulating maritime activities and issuing credentials to seafarers. A breach of this scale could facilitate identity theft, social engineering attacks, and physical stalking of maritime professionals across the country. The actor also claims possession of legal documents and employee data for the affected maritime companies. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by INEA or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱破壞了委內瑞拉的 INEA，洩露了 115,000 名水手資料威脅行為者「[L4TAMFUCK3R$]」在暗網論壇上發帖，聲稱委內瑞拉國家水生空間研究所 (INEA) 遭到完全破壞。根據清單，該行為者聲稱已獲得 114,265 名海事用戶和 13,485 家海事公司的個人資料。該貼文提供了概念驗證 JSON 片段，揭示了個別海員的高度敏感的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和生物識別資料。暴露的資料欄位包括： * 全名和姓氏 * 身分證號碼 (Cédula de Identidad) * 家庭住址和電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 詳細的身體描述（身高、膚色、頭髮顏色、眼睛顏色、臉部特徵） * 公民身分和國籍 INEA 是委內瑞拉的一個重要政府機構，負責監管證書活動並向海員執行證書。如此大規模的違規行為可能會助長全國範圍內對海事專業人員的身份盜竊、社會工程攻擊和人身跟踪。該演員還聲稱擁有受影響的海運公司的法律文件和員工資料。截至報告時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 INEA 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.text_zh: 昨天，歐盟在其網路制裁法規下將新的個人和實體添加到受制裁實體名單中。新增的實體包括 #BPH MediaLand LLC 及其所有者、#Lumma Stealer 背後的 2 名個人、俄羅斯 Reborn 網路軍的 2 名成員、#Conti 洩密事件中已知的 Bentley/Stern 以及 GRU 29155 部隊的 2 名成員。第一個評論中的連結。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 126 GB http://NTC.GOV.PH Data Dump on Darkweb Forum A darkweb forum post alleges the exposure of a massive data dump from the National Telecommunications Commission of the Philippines (NTC), claiming to contain over 200,000 documents and sensitive personal information. The actor, posting under the handle "KLAMMER," asserts that the breach includes internal memos, passwords, face scans, and personally identifiable information (PII) such as names, emails, contact numbers, and addresses. The alleged data is packaged in a 126 GB archive, split into multiple ZIP files for distribution. According to the post, the leaked data encompasses various file formats including PDF, DOCX, SQL, JSON, IMG, EXE, and TXT. The actor claims the following types of data are included in the dump: * Names, emails, and contact numbers * Personal Identifiable Information (PII) and addresses * PIN codes and pass keys * Passwords * Internal memos and sensitive files * Face scans The forum post frames the data leak as retaliation for what the actor describes as government negligence regarding a school shooting incident in Tacloban. The author alleges that law enforcement ignored warnings about an extremist network linked to the attack, leading to the deaths of three students and injuries to twenty others. The post criticizes the government for blaming video games rather than addressing security failures, stating that the data dump is intended to expose this "rotting incompetence." The National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) is the primary regulatory body for telecommunications in the Philippines, overseeing licensing, spectrum management, and consumer protection. A breach of this magnitude could potentially expose sensitive regulatory records and personal data of industry stakeholders or employees if authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by the NTC or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱暗網論壇上有 126 GB http://NTC.GOV.PH 資料轉儲 暗網論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱，菲律賓國家電信委員會 (NTC) 的大量資料轉儲被曝光，聲稱包含超過 200,000 份文件和敏感個人資訊。該攻擊者以「KLAMMER」為名發帖，聲稱此次洩露包括內部備忘錄、密碼、臉部掃描以及姓名、電子郵件、聯絡電話和地址等個人識別資訊 (PII)。所指控的數據被打包在一個 126 GB 的存檔中，並分成多個 ZIP 檔案進行分發。根據該帖子，洩漏的資料涵蓋多種文件格式，包括 PDF、DOCX、SQL、JSON、IMG、EXE 和 TXT。該演員聲稱轉儲中包含以下類型的數據： * 姓名、電子郵件和聯絡電話 * 個人識別資訊 (PII) 和地址 * PIN 碼和密鑰 * 密碼 * 內部備忘錄和敏感文件 * 面部掃描 論壇帖子將數據洩露描述為對演員所說的政府對塔克洛班校園槍擊事件的疏忽的報復。作者聲稱，執法部門忽視了與這次襲擊有關的極端主義網絡的警告，導致三名學生死亡，另外二十人受傷。這篇文章批評政府指責電子遊戲而不是解決安全問題，並指出資料轉儲的目的是揭露這種「腐爛的無能」。國家電信委員會 (NTC) 是菲律賓電信的主要監管機構，負責監督許可證、頻譜管理和消費者保護。如果真實的話，如此嚴重的違規行為可能會暴露行業利益相關者或員工的敏感監管記錄和個人資料。截至報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 NTC 或第三方安全研究人員的獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims Full Leak of SED Bogotá Education Data A darkweb forum post claims the full leak of personal data belonging to students and teachers from educational institutions in Bogotá, Colombia. The actor, operating under the handle DozerMxOFC, alleges that the breach affects 286 schools and exposes records for over 461,000 students and nearly 16,000 teachers. According to the listing on an underground forum, the compromised dataset includes extensive personally identifiable information (PII) and sensitive health-related data. The post enumerates the following exposed fields: * **Student Data:** Document numbers (CC/NUIP), full names, dates of birth, gender, home addresses, phone numbers, institutional and personal emails, school and campus details, grade information, and health insurance provider names (EPS, IPS, ARS). * **Health & Disability Info:** Disability type codes, health disability codes, and nearby health entity names. * **Teacher Data:** Document numbers, full names, emails, phone numbers, home addresses, positions, gender, dates of birth, and internal system codes. The alleged leak targets the Secretaría de Educación Distrital (SED) of Bogotá, a critical government body responsible for managing public education in Colombia's capital. The exposure of such granular data, including national ID numbers and home addresses for hundreds of thousands of minors, poses significant risks of identity theft, social engineering, and physical safety threats if the data is authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or official statements from the Bogotá education authorities. #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Colombia #PII #DarkWeb #IdentityTheft #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱 SED 波哥大教育資料全部洩露 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱哥倫比亞波哥大教育機構的學生和教師的個人資料全部洩露。該攻擊者以 DozerMxOFC 名義進行操作，聲稱此次違規行為影響了 286 所學校，並暴露了超過 461,000 名學生和近 16,000 名教師的記錄。根據地下論壇上的列表，受損的資料集包括大量的個人識別資訊 (PII) 和敏感的健康相關資料。該貼文列舉了以下公開欄位：* **學生資料：** 文件編號 (CC/NUIP)、全名、​​出生日期、性別、家庭住址、電話號碼、機構和個人電子郵件、學校和校園詳細資料、年級資訊以及健康保險提供者名稱（EPS、IPS、ARS）。 * **健康與殘障資訊：** 殘障類型代碼、健康殘障代碼和附近的健康實體名稱。 * **教師資料：** 文件編號、全名、電子郵件、電話號碼、家庭住址、職位、性別、出生日期和內部系統代碼。涉嫌洩密的目標是波哥大教育局（SED），該機構是負責管理哥倫比亞首都公共教育的重要政府機構。此類精細資料（包括數十萬未成年人的身分證號碼和家庭住址）的暴露，如果資料是真實的，將帶來身分盜竊、社會工程和人身安全威脅的重大風險。截至本報告發布之時，安全研究人員或波哥大教育當局的官方聲明尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。 #DataBreach #EducationSecurity #Colombia #PII #DarkWeb #IdentityTheft #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged Alfa-Bank Customer Database Leak Exposes 1M Records on Darkweb A darkweb forum post claims to expose a partial customer database belonging to Alfa-Bank, one of Russia’s largest private banks. The listing, published on July 11, 2026, alleges the release of sensitive personal and financial data for over one million individuals. According to the post, the leaked dataset is formatted as a CSV file containing 1,032,464 rows. The actor claims the data was extracted with a last update date of July 2, 2026. The exposed columns reportedly include: * account_id * email * name (full legal name in Cyrillic) * dob (date of birth) * card_number (full primary account numbers) * primary_phone * additional_contacts (secondary phone numbers or emails) Alfa-Bank is a major financial institution in Russia, known for its digital-first banking services and significant market share. The exposure of full card numbers alongside personal identifiers such as dates of birth and phone numbers could facilitate identity theft, social engineering attacks, and fraudulent transactions if the data is authentic. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Alfa-Bank or third-party security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 據稱阿爾法銀行客戶資料庫洩露，暗網上曝光了 100 萬條記錄 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱曝光了俄羅斯最大私人銀行之一阿爾法銀行的部分客戶資料庫。該清單發佈於 2026 年 7 月 11 日，聲稱洩露了超過 100 萬人的敏感個人和財務資料。根據該帖子，洩漏的資料集被格式化為包含 1,032,464 行的 CSV 檔案。該攻擊者聲稱，資料提取的最後更新日期為 2026 年 7 月 2 日。據報導，暴露的列包括：* account_id * 電子郵件 * 姓名（西里爾字母的法定全名） * dob（出生日期） * 卡號（完整的主要帳號） * 主電話 * 其他聯絡人（輔助電話號碼或電子郵件） Alfa-Bank 是俄羅斯的一家主要金融機構，以其數字優先的銀行服務和巨大的市場份額而聞名。如果資料是真實的，完整的卡號以及出生日期和電話號碼等個人識別碼的暴露可能會促進身份盜竊、社會工程攻擊和詐欺交易。截至本報告發布之時，阿爾法銀行或第三方安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Threat Actor Claims 23.5 TB Breach of Brazilian Health Tech Firm Mobilemed A ransomware threat actor has allegedly breached Mobilemed, a Brazil-based health technology company specializing in cloud-based Picture Archiving and Communication Systems (PACS). According to a post on an underground forum, the attacker claims to have exfiltrated 23.5 TB of data comprising over 52 million files from the organization's infrastructure. The post alleges that the stolen data includes sensitive patient information and internal credentials. The actor claims the dump contains: * 35 million records of patient Personally Identifiable Information (PII) * 17,176,370 personal files * 67,493 account PII records Mobilemed provides critical imaging infrastructure for radiologists, hospitals, and diagnostic centers in Brazil. The exposure of such a large volume of medical data could have severe implications for patient privacy and regulatory compliance under Brazil’s General Data Protection Law (LGPD). The threat actor demands a ransom of $1,500,000, setting a deadline of August 1, 2026. The post warns that if the payment is not made, the group intends to publish the full dataset or sell it on the dark web. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by Mobilemed or third-party security researchers. #DataBreach #Ransomware #Mobilemed #HealthcareSecurity #Brazil #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence
posts.text_zh: 🚨 威脅行為者聲稱巴西健康科技公司 Mobilemed 遭受了 23.5 TB 的攻擊 據稱，一名勒索軟體威脅行為者入侵了 Mobilemed，這是一家總部位於巴西的健康科技公司，專門從事基於雲端的圖片存檔和通訊系統 (PACS)。根據地下論壇上的一篇帖子，攻擊者聲稱已從該組織的基礎設施中竊取了 23.5 TB 數據，其中包括超過 5200 萬個文件。該貼文聲稱被盜資料包括敏感的病患資訊和內部憑證。該演員聲稱轉儲包含： * 3500 萬筆病患個人識別資訊 (PII) 記錄 * 17,176,370 個個人文件 * 67,493 個帳戶 PII 記錄 Mobilemed 為巴西的放射科醫生、醫院和診斷中心提供關鍵的影像基礎設施。如此大量的醫療資料的暴露可能會對病患隱私和巴西通用資料保護法 (LGPD) 的監管合規性產生嚴重影響。該威脅行為者要求支付 1,500,000 美元的贖金，截止日期為 2026 年 8 月 1 日。該貼文警告說，如果不付款，該組織打算發布完整資料集或在暗網上出售。截至本報告發布之時，Mobilemed 或第三方安全研究人員尚未對所指控的違規行為進行獨立核實。 #DataBreach #Ransomware #Mobilemed #HealthcareSecurity #Brazil #DarkWeb #ThreatIntelligence

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ Threat Actor Claims Sale of 15M Records from Rock N' Cash Casino A threat actor is allegedly offering full access to the game server and a database containing over 15 million records from the mobile casino application Rock N' Cash. According to a listing on an underground forum, the seller claims to possess 7 gigabytes of SQL data extracted from the service. The post alleges that the compromised application has been downloaded more than 10 million times on Google Play and is also available on the Apple App Store. The actor claims to have obtained "full access" to the game server alongside the complete user database. The exposed data reportedly includes: * 15 million lines of SQL data * Full administrative access to the game server Rock N' Cash is a popular social casino app developed by Playtika, one of the world's largest online gaming companies. If authentic, the exposure of such a large volume of user data could facilitate targeted phishing campaigns or identity theft against millions of players. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified.
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 威脅行為者聲稱出售 Rock N' Cash Casino 的 1500 萬筆記錄 據稱，威脅行為者提供了對遊戲伺服器和包含來自行動賭場應用程式 Rock N' Cash 的超過 1500 萬筆記錄的資料庫的完全存取權。根據地下論壇上的列表，賣家聲稱擁有從該服務中提取的 7 GB SQL 資料。該貼文稱，受感染的應用程式在 Google Play 上的下載量已超過 1000 萬次，並且還可以在 Apple App Store 上找到。該演員聲稱已獲得遊戲伺服器以及完整用戶資料庫的「完全存取權」。據報導，暴露的數據包括： * 1500 萬行 SQL 數據 * 對遊戲伺服器的完全管理訪問 Rock N' Cash 是一款流行的社交賭場應用程序，由全球最大的在線遊戲公司之一 Playtika 開發。如果是真實的，如此大量的用戶資料的暴露可能會促進針對數百萬玩家的有針對性的網路釣魚活動或身份盜竊。截至本報告發布之時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到獨立核實。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged Indian Army Air Defence Data Leak on Underground Forum A post on an underground forum claims to expose data belonging to the Indian Army's Air Defence sector. The listing, authored by a user named 'slepra' on July 10, 2026, is titled 'Army Air Defence India Data,' suggesting the unauthorized disclosure of military-related information. The source material does not provide specific details regarding the volume of data, the types of records exposed, or the method of acquisition. No screenshots, file names, or sample data were included in the thread to substantiate the claim. The Indian Army is one of the largest standing armies in the world, and its air defence systems are critical to national security infrastructure. If authentic, the exposure of such data could pose significant risks to national defense operations and strategic planning. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified, and no official statement has been issued by the Indian Ministry of Defence or related authorities.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 地下論壇涉嫌印度陸軍防空資料外洩 地下論壇上的一篇貼文聲稱洩漏了屬於印度陸軍防空部門的資料。該清單由名為“slepra”的用戶於 2026 年 7 月 10 日撰寫，標題為“印度陸軍防空數據”，暗示未經授權披露軍事相關資訊。來源材料沒有提供有關資料量、公開記錄類型或取得方法的具體細節。線程中沒有包含任何螢幕截圖、文件名或範例數據來證實這一說法。印度陸軍是世界上最大的常備軍之一，其防空系統對國家安全基礎設施至關重要。如果屬實，此類數據的暴露可能會對國防行動和戰略規劃構成重大風險。截至發稿時，所指控的違規行為尚未獨立核實，印度國防部或相關當局也未發表正式聲明。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged L’Assurance Maladie Breach Exposes 66M French Citizens' Health Data A darkweb forum post claims that a massive data breach has compromised the records of over 66 million French citizens, exposing sensitive health insurance information from L’Assurance Maladie, France’s statutory public health-insurance system. The actor alleges that the data was obtained from the Caisse Nationale de l’Assurance Maladie (CNAM), which coordinates the national system, and its local administrative offices, known as CPAM. According to the listing, the leaked dataset contains highly sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) and financial details for nearly the entire French population. The post enumerates the following categories of exposed data: * Identity data including full names, dates of birth, and gender * French social-security numbers (numéro de sécurité sociale) * Contact details such as home addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses * Banking information, specifically IBANs used for reimbursements * Medical-administrative records, including primary care physician details and long-term illness (ALD) diagnoses * Account metadata and audit logs The source material includes sample records showing fields such as numero_secu, iban_remboursement, medecin_traitant (treating physician), and specific medical conditions like "Diabète de type 1 et diabète de type 2" (Type 1 and Type 2 Diabetes). The data also reveals the status of rights (statut_droits) and reimbursement rates (taux_remboursement). L’Assurance Maladie is a critical national infrastructure entity in France, managing healthcare coverage and reimbursements for all residents. A breach of this scale would represent one of the largest compromises of citizen data in European history if verified. The exposure of medical conditions and banking details could facilitate targeted fraud, identity theft, and social engineering attacks against millions of individuals. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by security researchers or official statements from CNAM or French authorities.
posts.text_zh: 🚨 據稱 L’Assurance Maladie 違規洩露了 6600 萬法國公民的健康數據 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱，大規模數據洩露已經洩露了超過 6600 萬法國公民的記錄，洩露了法國法定公共健康保險系統 L’Assurance Maladie 的敏感健康保險信息。該行為者聲稱，這些數據是從協調國家系統的國家保險公司 (CNAM) 及其地方行政辦公室 (CPAM) 獲得的。根據清單，洩漏的資料集包含幾乎整個法國人口的高度敏感的個人識別資訊（PII）和財務詳細資訊。該帖子列舉了以下幾類暴露的數據： * 身份數據，包括全名、出生日期和性別 * 法國社會安全號碼 (numéro de sécurité Sociale) * 聯繫方式，如家庭住址、電話號碼和電子郵件地址 * 銀行信息，特別是用於報銷的 IBAN * 醫療管理記錄，包括初級保健醫生詳細信息numero_secu、iban_remboursement、medecin_traitant（治療醫生）以及特定的醫療狀況，例如「Diabète de type 1 et Diabète de type 2」（1 型和 2 型糖尿病）。該數據還揭示了權利狀態 (statut_droits) 和報銷率 (taux_remboursement)。 L’Assurance Maladie 是法國重要的國家基礎設施實體，負責管理所有居民的醫療保險和報銷。如果得到證實，這種規模的洩漏將成為歐洲歷史上最大的公民資料外洩之一。醫療狀況和銀行詳細資訊的暴露可能會促進針對數百萬人的有針對性的詐欺、身份盜竊和社會工程攻擊。截至本報告發佈時，安全研究人員或 CNAM 或法國當局的官方聲明尚未獨立核實所指控的違規行為。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: 🚨Alleged http://Daryn.online Breach Exposes 4.2M Kazakh User Records A darkweb forum post claims the exposure of 4.2 million user records from http://daryn.online, a prominent educational platform in Kazakhstan. The listing, posted on an underground forum, alleges that a comprehensive database containing personal information, credentials, and academic data for students, teachers, and administrators has been compromised. According to the post, the leaked dataset includes sensitive personally identifiable information (PII) and authentication details. The actor lists the following fields as exposed: * Full names (first and last) * Phone numbers and email addresses * Password hashes (bcrypt format) * Individual Identification Numbers (IIN) * Birthdates and gender * User roles (student, teacher, admin) * Academic metrics (grades, ratings, lesson counts) * Last known IP addresses The source material includes sample entries showing hashed passwords, active session tokens, and detailed profiles of educators, including one administrator with the email "admin6@mail.ru" and another with "support@daryn.online". The data also reveals internal identifiers such as user_id, school_id, and region_id, suggesting a structured database dump rather than a scraped surface-level leak. http://Daryn.online is a significant player in Kazakhstan's EdTech sector, providing online tutoring and preparation for national university entrance exams. The exposure of millions of records, including minors' data and teacher credentials, poses significant privacy risks and potential for credential stuffing or phishing attacks against the educational community. At the time of reporting, the alleged breach has not been independently verified by http://Daryn.online or security researchers.
posts.text_zh: 🚨涉嫌 http://Daryn.online 洩露 420 萬條哈薩克斯坦用戶記錄 一篇暗網論壇帖子聲稱，哈薩克斯坦著名教育平台 http://daryn.online 的 420 萬條用戶記錄被曝光。該清單發佈在一個地下論壇上，聲稱包含學生、教師和管理人員的個人資訊、證書和學術資料的綜合資料庫已被洩露。根據該帖子，洩露的資料集包括敏感的個人身份資訊（PII）和身份驗證詳細資訊。攻擊者列出了以下暴露的欄位： * 全名（名字和姓氏） * 電話號碼和電子郵件地址 * 密碼雜湊（bcrypt 格式） * 個人識別碼 (IIN) * 出生日期和性別 * 使用者角色（學生、教師、管理員） * 學術指標（成績、評級、課程數） * 最後已知的 IP 位址來源資料包括顯示雜湊密碼、活動會話令牌和教育工作者詳細資料的範例條目，包括一名擁有電子郵件的管理員「admin6@mail.ru」和另一個「support@daryn.online」。數據還揭示了內部標識符，例如 user_id、school_id 和 Region_id，表明是結構化資料庫轉儲，而不是刮擦的表面級洩漏。 http://Daryn.online 是哈薩克教育科技領域的重要參與者，提供線上輔導和全國大學入學考試準備。包括未成年人資料和教師憑證在內的數百萬筆記錄的曝光，會為教育界帶來重大的隱私風險和撞庫或網路釣魚攻擊的可能性。截至本報告發佈時，所指控的違規行為尚未得到 http://Daryn.online 或安全研究人員的獨立驗證。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: In an era where companies need to become more efficient and diverse they’ve basically picked the least efficient way to do it, with the biggest risks and highest costs - because everybody else is doing it. I know somebody at one of the big 4 who has written something in Claude that prompts Claude each twenty minutes for a question, then feeds Claude’s question back into Claude to use their tokens - because token usage is factored into employee evaluations. What are we even doing.
posts.text_zh: 在一個公司需要變得更有效率和多樣化的時代，他們基本上選擇了效率最低的方式來實現這一目標，同時風險最大，成本最高——因為其他人都在這樣做。我認識四大會計師事務所之一的某人，他在 Claude 中寫了一些東西，每二十分鐘提示 Claude 一個問題，然後將 Claude 的問題反饋給 Claude 以使用他們的代幣 - 因為代幣的使用情況會被納入員工評估中。我們到底在做什麼。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: This isn’t, btw, a Kevin Doesn’t Use AI rant. I use GenAI extensively for various testing things. I had access to Mythos before almost everybody. I pay for Copilot Pro+. I pay for Gemini. I AI generate terrible songs. I vibecode security scanners. My personal spend exceeds £500 this month to date. Do I think you should make every employee depend on these third party GenAI tools for their job? No. Its ridiculous. You’re also *locked in* to costs you can’t afford which *will rise*. It’s a cliff.
posts.text_zh: 順便說一句，這並不是凱文不使用人工智慧的咆哮。我广泛使用 GenAI 进行各种测试。我比几乎所有人都接触过神话。我支付了 Copilot Pro+ 的费用。我為雙子座付錢。我人工智能生成了糟糕的歌曲。我使用 vivicode 安全扫描仪。到目前為止，我的個人支出本月已超過 500 英鎊。我認為您是否應該讓每位員工都依賴這些第三方 GenAI 工具來完成工作？不，這很荒謬。您還「鎖定」了您無法承受的成本，而這些成本「將會上升」。這是一個懸崖。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: I’m really serious about this one btw. Companies have no measurable way of knowing what employees are doing with GenAI. They’re giving Claude Code out like it’s candy and just presuming everybody is an IT power user. They aren’t. They’re converting PDFs and vibe coding garden planning tools. Copilot M365 has a fake dashboard showing how productive people are.. it has no actual data. It just shows people use it. It’s CIO porn for the CEO. Orgs are pissing money up a wall worldwide.
posts.text_zh: 順便說一句，我對這件事真的很認真。公司沒有可衡量的方法來了解員工使用 GenAI 做了什麼。他們把 Claude Code 像糖果一樣分發出去，並假設每個人都是 IT 高級用戶。他們不是。他們正在轉換 PDF 和氛圍編碼花園規劃工具。 Copilot M365 有一個假儀表板，顯示人們的工作效率...它沒有實際數據。它只是表明人們使用它。這是 CEO 的 CIO 色情片。世界各地的組織都在揮霍金錢。

posts.name: GossiTheDog
posts.text: RE: https:// mastodon.social/@404mediaco/11 6908074107231828 Anybody who has worked in IT support in the trenches in enterprise IT will tell you there are some Excel power users who basically run the company, are macros wizards and actual ninjas.. about 0.1% of the workforce. About 99% of people can’t align a table in Word. Giving the 99% of people tools which cost $$$ per user a month and letting them do anything is like giving a child a car, and being surprised when they ram the car into a wall three days later and cost $10k after achieving nothing.
posts.text_zh: RE: https://mastodon.social/@404mediaco/11 6908074107231828 任何在企業 IT 一線從事 IT 支援工作的人都會告訴您，有一些 Excel 高級用戶基本上經營著公司，他們是宏嚮導和真正的忍者……大約佔員工的 0.1%。大約 99% 的人無法在 Word 中對齊表格。向 99% 的人提供每個用戶每月花費 10,000 美元的工具並讓他們做任何事情，就像給孩子一輛汽車，三天后他們將車撞到牆上，一無所獲，花費 1 萬美元，這就像給孩子一輛汽車一樣。
